body:
Join us this weekend for the Wheat Ridge Carnation Festival
---

| August 11th
---
| | |
---
| Join us this weekend!
---
| |
---
| Join the Laurel Imer for Congress team as we participate in the Wheat Ridge Carnation Festival Parade! Wear your patriotic gear as we hand out flags to the attendees and wave signs and flags from the float. Bring the whole family to this FREE event in Wheat Ridge, CO.
Staging begins at 8:30 AM, we will have donuts and coffee there for those who join us. Once Staging is complete the parade will begin promptly at 9:30 AM.
The registration deadline for the parade is Friday at 5:00 PM. If you have not already signed up to join us in the parade, please do so now so that we have an accurate headcount for the float.

name: FEEDBACK REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: one question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT COVID-19 safety measures, like wearing a mask and getting vaccinated? | | | **NEW POLL: Majorities of Americans support vaccines and mask mandates -- but not Republicans**

---
| ****We just learned a majority of Republicans OPPOSE mask mandates and vaccines.

We're outraged -- but we can't let them drown out safety and science, so we need to know:**

Do you SUPPORT COVID-19 safety measures, like wearing a mask and getting vaccinated?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Our country is facing a pivotal challenge.

COVID cases are on the rise across the country.

And we know that by getting vaccinated and wearing masks, we can get this deadly pandemic under control.

**But it 's horrible** \-- a brand new poll just revealed most Republicans are OPPOSED to these crucial safety precautions.

**We can 't let reckless Republicans undermine science and our safety -- so we're collecting data on where our best grassroots supporters stand.**
**Quickly, let us know:[Do you SUPPORT COVID-19 safety measures, like wearing a mask and getting vaccinated?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBerp9KH_)**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTL_dj-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_wMDVb7XF_)
---|---|---

Thank you,

Democratic HQ
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45445431&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjUzNzU5MQS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45445431&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjUzNzU5MQS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team AOC
subject: Line in the sand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a bold move, but it is what’s required to pass a budget bill that actually meets the climate crisis we’re in.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210811-2337-header&t=1&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe)
**On Monday** , over 200 of the UN's top climate scientists from around the world released their explosive report on the state of the climate. The UN chief called the report “code red for humanity.”
**On Tuesday** , the Senate passed a “bipartisan” infrastructure package that whittled down billions in proposed climate funding — including a clean electricity standard and billions in tax incentives for wind and solar.1
**It’s unacceptable — with a majority in the House and Senate and control of the White House, Democrats must take bold action on climate now**. This is our opportunity to respond immediately to save our planet — we simply cannot afford inaction any longer.
**That’s why Alexandria and her colleagues have drawn a line in the sand.** They’ve vowed to withhold their votes on the bipartisan infrastructure bill unless a budget bill that addresses the scope of the climate crisis passes at the same time.
This is a bold move, but it is what’s required to pass a budget bill that _**actually**_ meets the crisis we’re in. It’s exactly what Alexandria was elected to do and another example of why we need her in Congress.
[Will you show your support in this urgent climate moment by chipping in $3 to ensure that Alexandria can continue fighting for key climate measures in the budget bill and beyond?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210811-2?refcode=em20210811-2337-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2337_2526796_UldkBe&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe) A donation of any amount will have a direct and immediate impact.
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210811-2?refcode=em20210811-2337-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2337_2526796_UldkBe&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe)**
Alexandria has been very clear: People across this country elected _Democratic_ majorities in both branches of government and a Democrat to the White House to tackle major issues like the climate crisis.
It’s time for Congress to deliver on the priorities that voters elected them to fight for – not the lowest common denominator. That’s what Alexandria is laser-focused on.
[A wave of donations right now would power our fight ahead to get these critical climate protections passed. If you’re able to, please chip in $3 or anything you can now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210811-2?refcode=em20210811-2337-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2337_2526796_UldkBe&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe)
Thank you for standing with us in this key moment.
Team AOC
1 - [The New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9370?t=23&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210811-2?refcode=em20210811-2337-P&t=24&refcode2=2337_2526796_UldkBe&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210811-2337-P&t=25&akid=2337%2E2526796%2EUldkBe)**

clean_body: This is a bold move, but it is what’s required to pass a budget bill that actually meets the climate crisis we’re in. On Monday , over 200 of the UN's top climate scientists from around the world released their explosive report on the state of the climate. The UN chief called the report “code red for humanity.” On Tuesday , the Senate passed a “bipartisan” infrastructure package that whittled down billions in proposed climate funding — including a clean electricity standard and billions in tax incentives for wind and solar.1 It’s unacceptable — with a majority in the House and Senate and control of the White House, Democrats must take bold action on climate now. This is our opportunity to respond immediately to save our planet — we simply cannot afford inaction any longer. That’s why Alexandria and her colleagues have drawn a line in the sand. They’ve vowed to withhold their votes on the bipartisan infrastructure bill unless a budget bill that addresses the scope of the climate crisis passes at the same time. This is a bold move, but it is what’s required to pass a budget bill that actually meets the crisis we’re in. It’s exactly what Alexandria was elected to do and another example of why we need her in Congress. A donation of any amount will have a direct and immediate impact. Alexandria has been very clear: People across this country elected Democratic majorities in both branches of government and a Democrat to the White House to tackle major issues like the climate crisis. It’s time for Congress to deliver on the priorities that voters elected them to fight for – not the lowest common denominator. That’s what Alexandria is laser-focused on. Thank you for standing with us in this key moment. Team AOC 1 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

#

| | | | | | Good Afternoon ,On Friday, September 3rd, I'll be joining 2020 Libertarian Vice Presidential Nominee Spike Cohen and 2022 Miami-Dade County Commission Candidate Martha Bueno to support US Congressional Candidate Mike ter Maat's campaign for Florida's 20th District in the coming Special Election. If you're going to be in South Florida, don't miss this special opportunity, not only to support another great Libertarian candidate working to break through the two party system's wall, but to spend an evening with our candidates as well as one of the most powerful and respected voices in the Liberty Movement today, Mr. Spike Cohen.The event will begin at 7:00pm and will be held at the Lauderdale Lakes Moose Lodge in Tamarac. Click the button below to register to attend on Mike's campaign site.I hope to see you there!

body:

Derek,

Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me.

Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. And right now, we’re falling short of our goal.

**[Having Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race is really bad news. Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help make up ground?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWqKUTAkChxP7DPvYirMjDxpUVEWL6zuqUvoqqW2JWJ34D0-APag58kcKGkJqPUgzzYWaN2IwkZeGb9EeTHyJgy7B-bahb8kw4uLU04YAnffbuh2GxMbNnsAM_X0l5WazMW8Qckl85iiVfbJzDUDxjjvJc5Vf7Tt35KfNRTdC6NQksK2N24IRpAQMg4cdtBKFHNaKGkH0eDj6KZQLRBN1ye_q_KaBMbHoLVzGDp74zX4tlTJl_c3AgfGrvJJ0_idSS7f3x54AaDtolh-14MbwXv0/3ee/UCitW7ltTeK7SJ6R-t_s_g/h2/OePs8-VBPXIoegSUO5S7wc06W7OffexdYmRNDdrtU1Q)**

Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around.

We need people like you to give $25 or what you can right now -- before our deadline -- to show our strength.

Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. **[Will you please split $25 between Common Good VA and me right now to protect our fragile Democratic Senate majority? Please hurry because there are just a couple of days until our deadline.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWqKUTAkChxP7DPvYirMjDxq8KagHvXkTePGKFpN0PC0PjCTbz_YmAPoSvWeTjuof53fGDZAjyjdgRYdKRlGyHFc-M7UAcp91njxES7r6JxgILv0GDR4Sx0cDTMvitzvd4jhUdQQj0WsYeCd2sFJV_rBThCAN-ATduN1ahmuuHYisOVqp1mHBtUrYdutX7xgFFfO9NGnSU9QImg9gIydD_3B8yEM3DGytv7sT1uIkKIUS269stqTPg8a_AbkYsIqrMh46bWyERXLxknE71L6vDs4/3ee/UCitW7ltTeK7SJ6R-t_s_g/h3/kgg69fC9gJtFCslU37antbWVXWKcVvqP0FE9cWQGHhw)**

name: Team Jayapal
subject: A bridge too far?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Voters demanded bold and transformative change at the polls when they delivered the House, the Senate, and the White House to Democrats. Giving them anything less is unacceptable.
#
Peter,
Universal child care, paid leave, Medicare expansion, tuition-free community college, bold climate action, a pathway to citizenship for Dreamers, affordable housing, and so much more: **Pramila is fighting to ensure we don’t miss our opportunity to deliver on these priorities through a bold jobs and families package that people want, need, and deserve.**
But some senators think these kinds of popular, necessary, and urgent investments in working people and our communities are a bridge too far:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210811?refcode=em20210811-533&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=533_420207_3zDNs2&akid=533%2E420207%2E3zDNs2)
Voters demanded bold and transformative change at the polls when they delivered the House, the Senate, and the White House to Democrats. **Giving them anything less is unacceptable.**
**[If you’re still with Pramila in the fight to go big, bold, and fast on a jobs and families plan that delivers for the people, can you chip in $3 or more to our campaign today? Everything we care about is on the line — we need to mount a massive grassroots effort in the coming weeks to move our progressive priorities forward.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210811?refcode=em20210811-533&t=21&refcode2=533_420207_3zDNs2&akid=533%2E420207%2E3zDNs2)**

In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210811-533-footer&t=23&refcode2=533_420207_3zDNs2&akid=533%2E420207%2E3zDNs2)**

subject: My father said this about you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxVUNGOgyAQ_Bp9w8iKog8-tNf0NwyFtcUIGoTr-fcHnnfJJRtIhtmZYVQPsgUpc91DCbRsKZRlVUNX0IJfGK8r2rHr7cq6imWsfGtbqMWKWU3eBbMWcjH5q-9wrJqyq4FLaGtBkaoHPjgHDpLVFPK5f3m_bll1yeAeZ0MZHBZRzqFKIgkTn0iEQaelINOirSdjsMoJvWn7JJFktPeIkTqFeSe4GIJfHq1ClVV3YZZgfVbd6jKDJngzGFQ6mIigEXoeXuOJb0twEiNu5GBFnBOXwqxCP218ObugQ3IC-s-LaLMuzgvrh58qjiYmN6QPnPl_FRcbd1KoxPQ4yHV3W3TMXa_Wt55nvTU89vpMCY8yY4ZZj3uf8WsGEIJW8Tp6g1bxFphsicKKEsYEJzFiQ2SNIBDLViJPZPiIp99X_Ns8RYujiITy2ze726Oz)

Friend,

I need to tell you something important.

**I was going through our donor files and YOU were identified as one of my father 's TOP supporters.**

Whenever we've needed you to help us protect my father's America First agenda, you never failed to step up.

subject: Love it or Leave it

body:
"Every time that flag's unfurled..."
"Every time that flag's unfurled..." No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Love it or Leave it](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-j/)
Are you sick of people criticizing America? Yet people keep trying to get in, not out of our country. And the guy responsible for keeping illegal aliens out, isn't doing his job. Maybe he ought to be impeached. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Joe Biden - Worst President Ever?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Is it too early to start thinking about where Joe Biden fits in best versus worst presidents? Read about it here in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [6 Months into the Biden Presidency - How's it Going?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-u/)
We're 6 months into the Biden presidency. What kind of job is he doing? You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### ["There's Nothing More Permanent than a Temporary Government Program"](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tluhhhlt-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats are in a race to enact as much of their liberal agenda as possible before they lose control of Congress in the next election. Unfortunately, once you expand government, or get people hooked on free stuff paid for by other people's taxes, it's hard to ever get rid of. You can read about it in this week's blog. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Bombshell Report on Newsom's Corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Catastrophic Corruption](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqWOuRyHeqlXfRbg_3QI3Cq2wtFJWkESuEeqNbbJSKWR-0ckD7N12-CYSvHkSFOHVI&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=1) PG&E, with multiple felonies to its name, has given Gavin Newsom more money than any politician. They even pay his wife’s salary. Now, a whistleblower [has come forward](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ECAu1VcMCd6vUz2yLKk86cbFTr2qL2O13FcsqWY3YzjTwSnKKdGzgY2CRO3FbTll4VLia1UhnlWXka3z3GaHjYFIC1tYt7WDBFhYvtuUHShmcSqpgr2jNofTjOzz8a6ReeWCFtj-7y_xEPc4ant9Q_Cb-Q_RypUyWO16xyF133g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=2) at the PUC. Former Executive Director Alice Stebbins says Newsom took “complete control” over the agency’s oversight of PG&E and she was ordered to sign a safety certificate against her will. _“I did not want to sign this. The bottom line is I was told to sign it. You will sign this. Period," she said. "I trusted my Governor...And that was a mistake.”_ Yesterday, I held [a press conference](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharNidrG45V8alyn9Uo9n_0Is0ueGa5MQA-RjMn66dRhvQQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=3) to announce my plans for an investigation. The Newsom-PG&E racket puts everything in a nutshell: Corruption is ruining California. Meanwhile, Newsom is using our teachers and nurses as political pawns, imposing new mandates that no other state has. As I [said at the debate](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyETGad5gReiWG8X5cf_8vJNwD2OQSgAzG-ouNfkQdkzQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=4), to make the case Newsom got COVID right you’d have to make the case all 49 other states got it wrong. That's an impossible case to make. Which is why I'm hopeful that as voters face the most important question in state history – “Shall Gavin Newsom be recalled (removed) from the office of Governor?” – a resounding majority will make the right choice. [Support Yes on Recall, Yes on Kiley, No on Corruption](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=5) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwc0LJLYEZABOvbM8zleR45VlRqPMF2UmK5PGE-cGrvzw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug11_final&n=7)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Infrastructure = Gender?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
body:
Peter,
The massive infrastructure bill proposed by
Biden and some Senators has some interesting ideas about what
should be considered infrastructure.
Page 2,149 of the bill includes the following
section:

No individual in the United
States may, on the basis of actual or perceived race, color,
religion, national origin, sex, gender identity, sexual
orientation, age, or disability, be excluded from participation
in, be denied the benefits of, or be subjected to discrimination
under any program or activity that is funded in whole or in part
with funds 16 made available to carry out this title [emphasis
added].

This is a complete reversal of current law
and has NOTHING TO DO WITH INFRASTRUCTURE. This is Joe Biden's
"leadership" - if you can't get something done legitimately, then
lie, cheat, and steal until his policies are finally appeased.
Biden and the radical left know the
mainstream media will never stand in their way, much less report
on it.
That's why I'm lending my voice to ensure all
Americans learn of this blatant attempt to force dangerous
progressive policies through the Legislative branch. The
Democrats KNOW it would never pass on its own, and that's why we
need to put an end to their agenda. Right Here. Right Now.
Will you help me stop Joe Biden from using
the "Infrastructure" bill as a ruse to pass his dangerous,
progressive agenda?
This is only one passage in a HUGE bill - I
am CERTAIN that there are more "surprises" in this bill-and like
Obamacare-only a few members of Congress will read it.
That is why I wake up every day and fight for
what is right.
That is why I make it clear that I'm
providing a Clarion Call for threats to American taxpayers.
That is why I am so hated and vilified by the
left.
That is why I need your help to keep standing
up to the left and exposing their lies to the American people so
together, we can defeat their radical, progressive agenda before
Joe Biden can sign any of his desired bills.
The Democrat Party's attempt to reclassify
gender in America is only getting started, and we can see how the
liberals will use any means necessary to win.
It harms the fabric of our society-most
importantly, it harms our children.
We have to fight just as hard to stop their
dangerous assault on our society.
Please, join me as I protect this nation for
future generations.
For America,

Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri

STAND WITH JOSH

PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
SENATE

sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.

Peter,

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom will be mailed to **every registered voter** by August 16th - _just days away._

_**But some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

We need your help to get the word out and help voters understand that before they can elect a new governor of California, **they must first VOTE YES TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM.**

| Peter,

---
On Thursday night, the **Democrats tried to ram their wasteful, corrupt "infrastructure" bill** through the Senate...

...and **EVERY SINGLE SENATOR but me** was ready to **let them pass it without a fight.** (I couldn't believe what I was seeing, Peter)

So I stood up and fought it. _**By myself.**_

I've only been in the Senate a few months, but never in my wildest nightmares did I expect **_every single Senate Republican but me_ to _betray_ conservative values** like that.

It's clear: we have **TWO fights** to win in 2022:
1. Stop the bleeding... by **defeating the Democrats** and taking back the Senate.

2. Start rebuilding America... by electing a **tidal wave of principled conservatives** who aren't afraid to fight for this nation.

**I won last night 's fight by myself, Peter.** **[But I can't do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117262:Jd5xFqlNE:m:1:3253819041:DF687D892661D7FB00CB0E465D5C8CBF:r "But I can’t

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, friend. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58117331:6N7wSqlN8:m:1:3253819041:C463E793A7EB9FE2397364DFBDAB213C:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. clean_body: Hi Peter, Bo Dietl here. You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like Goodfellas and T he Wolf of Wall Street. But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me. Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. That's when the two men sped away. Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. "Will you help me stop Joe Biden from using the “Infrastructure” bill as a ruse to pass his dangerous, progressive agenda?" This is only one passage in a HUGE bill - I am CERTAIN that there are more "surprises" in this bill--and like Obamacare--only a few members of Congress will read it. That is why I wake up every day and fight for what is right. That is why I make it clear that I'm providing a Clarion Call for threats to American taxpayers. That is why I am so hated and vilified by the left. "That is why I need your help to keep standing up to the left and exposing their lies to the American people so together, we can defeat their radical, progressive agenda before Joe Biden can sign any of his desired bills." The Democrat Party's attempt to reclassify gender in America is only getting started, and we can see how the liberals will use any means necessary to win. It harms the fabric of our society --most importantly, it harms our children. We have to fight just as hard to stop their dangerous assault on our society. "Please, join me as I protect this nation for future generations." For America, "Josh Hawley" Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri | "STAND WITH JOSH" | PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Cancel culture attacking Ohio baseball
body:
I'm sick of the cancel culture plaguing the country.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FR85hLTCz7V6d42677lpzGIdhONbHmu_04yFMMrj46YqgDjFMUQjP0pZ2SKUW627BEvgdg3eNpznYlhRBWbf5ZGbRgfOGRnDaKuCfBvoi8k653c8iv3Rp5m7MzCuy4WJeTpJaJJ82o4L5_gRRGy4wr5Qo40a41BYTFEtfkdhLdZpKXhF_XxOfA==&c=GUWhvLhxnm6QmbApdjUBe6XuFhGLEmXrhVh8apfpbEg_cdX_r0C5Pw==&ch=9OAk-74bKrIKsaQIdKLA7rURyrkLPEAA_b2nLlzqpzAgl2T5gOKLQg==)
---
| Peter,
I'm sick of cancel culture plaguing our country. It shows the decay of our society when these trivial issues are used to divide us and destroy the reputations of brands or individuals.
Despite surveys showing Native Americans are NOT offended by the name of the Cleveland Indians, cancel culture is forcing us to change the name upon the altar of Woke culture.
This is a sign of weak leaders. No one is standing up to the madness happening - whether it's election integrity, woke corporations, or cancel culture.
[If you're sick of this too, then please send an urgent donation today of $5, $20.22, $50, or any amount you can spare >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FR85hLTCz7V6d42677lpzGIdhONbHmu_04yFMMrj46YqgDjFMUQjP0pZ2SKUW627BEvgdg3eNpznYlhRBWbf5ZGbRgfOGRnDaKuCfBvoi8k653c8iv3Rp5m7MzCuy4WJeTpJaJJ82o4L5_gRRGy4wr5Qo40a41BYTFEtfkdhLdZpKXhF_XxOfA==&c=GUWhvLhxnm6QmbApdjUBe6XuFhGLEmXrhVh8apfpbEg_cdX_r0C5Pw==&ch=9OAk-74bKrIKsaQIdKLA7rURyrkLPEAA_b2nLlzqpzAgl2T5gOKLQg==)
We NEED to take back control of the Senate. We need strong conservatives to stand up to woke corporations and the government.
I am not a career politician looking to scratch backs. I am a successful businessman like Trump who is looking to defend the Constitution, limit the role of government, and protect our values.
Peter, we cannot wait until 2024 to take back our country. Stand with my campaign today and help us win this important election.
[Donate $5 clean_body: I'm sick of the cancel culture plaguing the country. | | | | | | == | Peter, I'm sick of cancel culture plaguing our country. It shows the decay of our society when these trivial issues are used to divide us and destroy the reputations of brands or individuals. Despite surveys showing Native Americans are NOT offended by the name of the Cleveland Indians, cancel culture is forcing us to change the name upon the altar of Woke culture. This is a sign of weak leaders. No one is standing up to the madness happening - whether it's election integrity, woke corporations, or cancel culture. == We NEED to take back control of the Senate. We need strong conservatives to stand up to woke corporations and the government. I am not a career politician looking to scratch backs. I am a successful businessman like Trump who is looking to defend the Constitution, limit the role of government, and protect our values. Peter, we cannot wait until 2024 to take back our country. Stand with my campaign today and help us win this important election. == == == == == == == In Liberty, | | Mike Gibbons Candidate for US Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

## We need YOUR HELP

Call To Action Does Abbott fully support a Full Forensic Audit? We would like to confirm he stands with Texans and wants to protect our votes. Our votes deserve equal protection under the law.
Will he be adding a Full Forensic Audit to his Proclamation or Session 2 Agenda?
Please reach out to his office and ask. Please make it loud and clear that Texans demand a FULL FORENSIC AUDIT Greg Abbott
(512) 463-2000

Patrick has kept quiet long enough. Either he is on board with conservative Texans or he is turning a blind eye while our state and county is stolen right out from under us. Ask him to back HB26. Dan Patrick
(512) 463-0001

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This is longer, but I hope you'll read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
This is a longer email, friend, but I hope you'll read it. Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, is coming to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.** Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration -- pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.** I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' upcoming visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.** Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. **[I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our mid-month fundraising goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33940630/300412088/565612021?refcode=e20210812_mwh-devos&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmYzZjU5Yy04M2ZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohVdTdwnV46E1-L3X1q6XN43cjh0VNaCQYPUTa8jM60=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33940631/300412091/565612021?refcode=e20210812_mwh-devos&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmYzZjU5Yy04M2ZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohVdTdwnV46E1-L3X1q6XN43cjh0VNaCQYPUTa8jM60=)

I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, expanding the Child Tax Credit, protecting health care, and more. But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far.
**[So please, consider making a $5 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33940635/300412095/565612021?refcode=e20210812_mwh-devos&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmYzZjU5Yy04M2ZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohVdTdwnV46E1-L3X1q6XN43cjh0VNaCQYPUTa8jM60=)**
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Chief James Craig
subject: disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r) | |
---
Peter,

**What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement?**

__**Tell us to "suck it up."**__

I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)

It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country.

**My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support.**

We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security.

Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act.

And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police.

I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of that team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120006:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120007:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120008:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120009:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-171745](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120005:J9HSRqlNs:m:1:3253819041:41D195119FE11F00BCD8232AD9FC6B02:r)**_

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: He’s the worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
The most anti-gay, anti-woman, pro-gun candidate.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33941314/300414933/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjQzNThiYy04NWZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAAlmT1SNWj_4g6snI89Se24Bm39z5-wp_hEeruI7aQ=&emci=4fb91b89-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bb4358bc-85fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek -- it’s important for you to know what’s on the line for Virginia this year, so let me introduce you to my opponent, Glenn Youngkin.

Youngkin is an extremist, right-wing culture warrior who’s been hiding his agenda for months. He’s dropped out of two debates, been hiding from the cameras, and the only time we saw him speaking candidly, he was talking about how he’ll go on the offensive against reproductive health care in Virginia.

If he wins, he could be the most anti-woman, anti-gay, pro-gun Governor in the history of Virginia politics.

**[He’s wrong for the Commonwealth, and we’ve got to make sure he doesn’t get elected in November. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

name: Neil Shah
subject: No Vaccine Mandates
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| Peter, It’s hard to believe that it’s come to this: Tim Walz and his corporate overlords are going to force Minnesotans to take a vaccine just to keep their jobs or go to school. **You deserve to be free in making choices that only affect your life. Government or private businesses have no right to tell you what you must put in your body.** With the ‘delta’ strain we now know that both the vaccinated and the unvaccinated can spread the virus. Highly vaccinated countries, like Iceland and Israel, are seeing a massive spike in infections. Your vaccine choice only affects you. It affects your neighbor no more than your decision to drive to work instead of walking. I became a doctor to help people, not push a narrative for the medical industrial complex. And now I'm running to become Governor of Minnesota to protect health freedom, not to become a tyrant like Tim Walz. Did you see that Walz just announced a vaccine mandate for all state workers? Right behind Walz are the University of Minnesota, other colleges and dozens of employers ready to force a vaccine mandate on their students and workers.
## **Walz has gone too far!**
**If you want the vaccine, then there is plenty to go around. If you don’t want the vaccine, then you should not be forced to take the vaccine just to live a normal life. Period.** I promise as Governor to never infringe on your rights, even if there's an emergency. That's why I was proud to sign the Never Again Pledge. In my work, I remove deadly cancers. When Governor Walz unilaterally decided to stop elective surgeries, it shut down my business and cost my patients dearly. Now it’s time to remove the cancers of unilateral emergency powers and radical leftism - and it’s going to take an outsider to do it. Watch my video. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kxRmIu0rXokwNNMTv35VYGk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=no_vaccine_mandates&n=1) **I'm happy to report that our campaign has some early momentum, thanks to conservatives like you. We just raised****$100,000 in the first week****of becoming a candidate.** But the media doesn't want to talk about an outsider doctor who is challenging the power of Governor Walz and the political elite. I could use your help. **If you like my message of standing up for health freedom, please share this email with a friend or tell them to visit my website at**[**electneil.com.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rOkbRklTyTNtmBTRPmVdijk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=no_vaccine_mandates&n=2) Career politicians are ruining this state. That’s why we need an outsider to remove the cancer of radical leftism. We'll never preserve liberty if we keep playing by the same playbook every election. Help get the message out by sharing this email with family and friends or encouraging them to visit [**electneil.com**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rOkbRklTyTNtmBTRPmVdijk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=no_vaccine_mandates&n=3). Thank you for your time. Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDKYjXcFcnny7CTruXj7gH44&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=no_vaccine_mandates&n=4) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)
---

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I'm asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I'm already lucky that you opened this!

**Here 's my elevator pitch to you**: I need you to know my background, why I'm running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I'm going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I'm running for public office.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)

I'm the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army's Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012\.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)
---

We've lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we 're new parents, we've had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can't just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that's made America great.

I'm running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left 's agenda doesn't sit right with me. I didn't serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can't stomach it anymore, so I'm running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I'm asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn't in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)**.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don't work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren't following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won't you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58120893:6C2-N4lEN:m:1:3253819041:8852F85CFFE5BBCAE200DACBCEC062C6:r)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 29, 2021.

Charlie Crist has been traveling across Florida on his Oportunidad Para Todos Tour, visiting folks where they live and work and listening to their concerns. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FRG9nD6jzWOglWzPOY0bgA==/BG74m0LE_dg5dcNOJHNaLA==?refcode=20210814_f_8AK_main&amount=25)

**Above all, Charlie wants to know how, if elected governor, he can create opportunities for working Floridians. That 's the foundation of his campaign: building a Florida for All.

name: Mary Vought
subject: Rand Paul Says Resist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
"Resist. They can't arrest us all. They can't keep all your kids
home from school. They can't keep every government building
closed - although I've got a long list of ones they should. We
don't have to accept the mandates, lockdowns, and harmful
policies of the petty tyrants and feckless bureaucrats. We can
simply say no, not again."
- U.S. Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY)

Fellow Conservative:

Sen. Rand Paul made an important statement last week
calling on Americans to resist the mandates, lockdowns, and
failed policies of the past. He said it's time to choose freedom,
and we agree!Watch Senator Paul's powerful message and then make
an urgent contribution to his campaign.Senator Paul's leadership
in standing up to Dr. Fauci and the liberal elites has made him
one of their top targets for defeat next year.Conservatives must
have his back.

Please support Senator Rand Paul right now.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to help us fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

WATCH RAND PAUL'S MESSAGE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Four years after Charlottesville
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Four years ago, hundreds of white supremacists convened in Charlottesville, Virginia for a violent "Unite the Right Rally." Wielding torches, weapons, and confederate flags, the group gathered and chanted phrases like "white lives matter," "Jews will not replace us," and "blood and soil." [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33945053/300431067/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmY2MyOWQyLThlZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2C28yfz6JsEu3blc18HHpt89fl8ynHRhiYXtrDzBOlo=&emci=0f45d0a0-f4f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cfcc29d2-8efb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) Team,

Four years ago, hundreds of white supremacists convened in Charlottesville, Virginia for a violent "Unite the Right Rally." Wielding torches, weapons, and confederate flags, the group gathered and chanted phrases like "white lives matter," "Jews will not replace us," and "blood and soil."

The images of this rally are still burned into many of our brains, even four years later. It is impossible to forget the faces of hatred we saw that day. We cannot talk about the events of Charlottesville without talking about Heather Heyer, the brave counter-protester who was tragically murdered during the events by a self-proclaimed neo-Nazi. She lost her life fighting for justice and equity for all Americans.

The Charlottesville rally was the result of a rise in racism, xenophobia, and antisemitism in our country -- incited by Donald Trump and his allies. We wish we could say that this was an isolated event, but earlier this year, we once again saw what happens when white supremacists feel emboldened by political leaders.

On January 6, a violent group of white supremacists gathered at our nation's Capitol. As in Charlottesville, they carried weapons and confederate flags and shouted racial slurs at the officers who served that day.

Charlottesville and the Capitol insurrection are a painful reminder of how far we still have to go as a nation to root out racism. But it's impossible to make progress when white supremacists hold positions in our Congress.

We're working to defeat these members of Congress and root out white supremacy from our political system to ensure events like Charlottesville and January 6 never happen again. I hope you'll continue to join us in this important fight.

Thank you,

Never Again PAC

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

Purcellville, VA 20134
United States

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Make Education Sane Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Fellow Patriot, There are people out there in the far-off corners of the world who hate everything that the United States of America stands for -- and they have made it their life’s work to destroy our country. **But they’re not who I’m worried about.** I’m worried about the people right here in our own backyards who share the same hatred for our country as the terrorists hiding in the caves of Afghanistan. Because when President Lincoln said “America will never be destroyed from the outside...if we lose our freedoms, it will be because we destroyed ourselves” he was RIGHT. The most dangerous threats to our republic aren’t hiding in caves -- they’re hiding in plain sight in our K-12 classrooms. They’re training the next generation to hate our country, hate our freedom and hate our Constitution. _Because they know the generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it, and surrenders us to socialism once and for all._ The Radical Left has been quietly taking over local schoolboards one community at a time -- using their legions of teachers and radical union operatives as foot-soldiers to overhaul our education system right under our noses. **Now, I have bad news and I have good news.** The bad news is that they’ve succeeded. They’ve put Marxists in classrooms across the country teaching children not how to think but what to think. They tell students that if they’re white, that they’re evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they’re black, that they’re helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. **The good news is this fight is far from over, and help is on the way.** The 1776 Project PAC is the very first Political Action Committee of its kind -- specifically created to take local school boards out of the hands of these America-hating, radical liberals... ...and replace them with men and women from their own communities who share the values and sense of Patriotism that REAL Americans like you, me, my dad and so many others hold dear. **[I’m asking you on behalf of my friends at the 1776 Project PAC to join their critical work to save our kids and our country with a one-time gift of $28 or more.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ee5885a6f6949aa9bbe50ad38f01de2&_e=cFAjsMXrTX-wjl6pEolJbzHQTwbpyL2aPshDmDe3YIzYTzMFISN_OqrKXGsNlIsFYY2DvzVbFEmctTMVMWB1oZqblmcgiGKw2btroduLdAk2Z5uydZfLz0VRbKG_AEnQ89UNEd0oHmvqyedU1Xl9meyVrSuctQHr-6zP3KtwfBlbi9c4kq0XN14p0AiNZ6shcS9rZq6f3_YBm3qFBg_whRqujKtTRWY3bP0ZWkz3MmET5hBGXKGfAvYHoneUXJLUjl37XeGP-fZoO1FQO0ZbaJzt7zed9Hy1zt7CGaLJe4iQvS0Lr9snFmEcAEcW9cfMBLIOd6rzMmjBpDL31AsGiiho13pcRYsDVbY9RwSuzJyLgHPep08I1yKnpgLjWLUklhpA7ABJIcVQtFejv46g5sUBaJt6xENkzu9Bxia_LsuQnSgPPo2WnCfmByb-ml3zTABKXCttmo2DyyQl3qaDnijhQyI3Y71LmTFS6sw2ZX0%3D)** I know $28 is an odd amount to ask for, so let me explain... $28 in the hands of the 1776 Project PAC can have more of an impact than a gift of that size to most other Political Action Committees. **The battle to save our kids and our country is being won and lost on the local level -- not in Washington, DC.** That’s why the 1776 Project PAC is different from any other group out there... ...and why your support is so critical today. Local school board races are (relatively) low-cost elections, unlike those that grab the headlines every 2-4 years. In many cases, your $28 contribution will have a much greater impact going to work for the 1776 Project PAC than it would for a national race. **Because the truth is, the 1776 Project PAC is doing what the politicians wouldn’t.** They’re stepping up to the plate, going state to state, and making education SANE again. My father recognized this threat during his time in office -- and he took Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project head on. We need to continue what he started, and join him in this fight. _Now, I don’t personally know you -- but I know you care about the future of our great nation._ **You might not have kids in school like I do, but it doesn’t matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a stake in this fight.** [**Please don’t underestimate what a difference your $28 could make.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ee5885a6f6949aa9bbe50ad38f01de2&_e=cFAjsMXrTX-wjl6pEolJbzHQTwbpyL2aPshDmDe3YIzYTzMFISN_OqrKXGsNlIsFYY2DvzVbFEmctTMVMWB1oZqblmcgiGKw2btroduLdAk2Z5uydZfLz0VRbKG_AEnQ89UNEd0oHmvqyedU1Xl9meyVrSuctQHr-6zP3KtwfBlbi9c4kq0XN14p0AiNZ6shcS9rZq6f3_YBm3qFBg_whRqujKtTRWY3bP0ZWkz3MmET5hBGXKGfAvYHoneUXJLUklcoXf840IWWOzMvQchxQD8r-TPDsyWtnhdfw4h5s0R1yOYL2AUgDbMSZF4kWnFzFnOFFXZIpK80UK4wGharnb-_jIWG1sqrv8LMaYDhUNnoVp5-sSkxwR1w7MjkP1mi6XPkNrL_J2X1hDpeWjig3ywWjgS7qbaH0D9L4WiP9Cthpu-pRpcAZw8xCO5N2c7og-faQepd6ddQPKQEsZ98iHU4-sINCxmy9wYRWOltWc0%3D) name: Mark McCloskey
subject: “Republicans are white supremacists”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
The DEM congresswoman who made that claim threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm calling for Pelosi to investigate her. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1890f14c207f4c26880dca06c33b38f1&_e=Zde5CMFMfuLzIROWnmXI_UE4dGj_GN7UmP34pNU0hnz2lsFdLs6OoydJ6lGxN0qOMhm6NYo9aPwz_waTjzTndfn7WhJCU1UY3zL3b7Xot9-k3Xc0V3pwSFUZej587Kb8baARpNWP-puzKCWa8ghQV6FeV6EHj-ZA_ggfDPXDlTeX_ug_tnR6h8b76cQaML0xB6qDcqZj4T-dVUCwU0nkYD6eQG5rM6gMmLOmnM7wc8r8Jj3IBbqvdfH1JysVqe1cScOC72DofpT7ZvY9ZGUSezCsCtN6NoVRn25-TizAO0HK8472fcbj-ZJWlAsJYdmI5XDkhA9r8IcQTHmSF-ucSYckhzjlOdUYGmccjRbkiB2te1n0PYYKBb-BB_wQxBpHOAeTpeNh50OXZPTELkPcPueQSo7iT2FLb1DGgdpCZG2bcHlx6l-cnpwURPYw4OXUP1nFPoIl50MnOOhiXDFojzVd0xI4KRt43cMESshIsXn9eIlTtGjzJRMJpF197Br4AP0DIiI5sVczHkv7FFKmz__USprVrY5k9_82WDJwB84IAvS71cvoJbE9WwirIK7UkB5neM4jnB3GXWiA7PyKK-E4mNtk22mqddn0mff-A0k%3D)
---

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1890f14c207f4c26880dca06c33b38f1&_e=Zde5CMFMfuLzIROWnmXI_UE4dGj_GN7UmP34pNU0hnz2lsFdLs6OoydJ6lGxN0qOMhm6NYo9aPwz_waTjzTndfn7WhJCU1UY3zL3b7Xot9-k3Xc0V3pwSFUZej587Kb8baARpNWP-puzKCWa8ghQV6FeV6EHj-ZA_ggfDPXDlTeX_ug_tnR6h8b76cQaML0xB6qDcqZj4T-dVUCwU0nkYD6eQG5rM6gMmLOmnM7wc8r8Jj3IBbqvdfH1JysVqe1cScOC72DofpT7ZvY9ZGUSezCsCtN6NoVRn25-TizAO0HK8472fcbj-ZJWlAsJYdmI5XDkhA9r8IcQTHmSF-ucSYckhzjlOdUYGmccjRbkiB2te1n0PYYKBb-BB_wQxBpHOAeTpeNh50OXZPTELkPcPvQJdKe3DdaLvhJ7BAIehrLrFCv-9mkZwXR0d55dP4IHhhfLuF3FzekfF3ZtG_9XziM9O-OOCWbr1UvQLsdBjFbJiiQz2hjzMbhuGP4yV_OkWBmqDJIodhxDN_1NYQYvjEcjRQYdLU5isY_93U-4KEEYlppYDLb9EMzlB58UOghK28x2h2uJnNivoytuzIJEdAqA4G-b6fsTO0OtMfn6eOA%3D)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. body:

Last year, Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01) made history when she became the first Black woman elected to represent Missouri in the Halls of Congress.

Since then, the right has relentlessly attacked Cori with sexist and racist rhetoric. _Fox News_ ' Tucker Carlson went as far to say Cori's "not smart enough for a real job."

We aren't surprised, team, but there's no way we're letting these attacks go unanswered.

**[Will you split a donation between Karen and Cori now to support their fight for social and economic justice in Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2acCUehyj68KmFPL6b9I3IJQx09dKcXarrMm8RkWnAU=/3KEASjrgB1MfL-oSzdo_lqFW1ud9DmPjcOXK8c6JS9Y=?gpsid=39_132_20109&refcode=em21_210811_bush_fnd_gq_act_tdm_kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210811_bush_fnd_gq_act_tdm_kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Cori isn't a career politician. She's a nurse, single mother, ordained pastor, and community activist.

Cori is fighting alongside Karen -- and it's no coincidence that the GOP, _Fox News_ , and every right-wing media group have made her a regular target for their racist talking points.

**[We need to band together to support Cori. Will you split a donation between Karen and Cori now to keep these two leaders fighting for the American people?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2acCUehyj68KmFPL6b9I3IJQx09dKcXarrMm8RkWnAU=/3KEASjrgB1MfL-oSzdo_lqFW1ud9DmPjcOXK8c6JS9Y=?gpsid=39_132_20109&refcode=em21_210811_bush_fnd_gq_act_tdm_kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210811_bush_fnd_gq_act_tdm_kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Help us show the GOP and their rightwing media that their words hold no power here.

In solidarity,

Karen Bass Finance Team

name: Team Franchot
subject: BREAKING: Major Union Endorsement!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We’re very excited to bring you a major campaign update: the International Longshoremen’s Association Local 333, a major union located in Baltimore, has just endorsed Peter Franchot for Governor!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=20.22]This is an important union endorsement for our people-powered movement -- and we want to make sure that this moment doesn’t go to waste. Will you chip in whatever you can by our 11:59 PM deadline tonight to make sure that we can maintain our momentum in this race and win this competitive election?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement]The Port of Baltimore serves as an essential economic generator for the state, and our hardworking longshoremen play a key role in its continuing success. As our next Governor, Peter Franchot is going to make sure that our longshoremen -- and ALL of Maryland’s working families -- are not left behind in our state’s economic recovery.
He’s going to build the middle class with family-supporting wages, affordable healthcare, expanded home ownership, and a better quality of life during retirement. And he’s going to kickstart Maryland’s economic growth by making critical investments in major infrastructure projects like statewide 5G and renewable energy. These investments will create 100,000 new family-supporting jobs, and will ensure that Maryland’s vibrant economy can continue to thrive well into the 21st century.
We’re incredibly excited about Peter Franchot’s plans for the future of our state’s economy -- but we can only get there with YOUR help. By powering our campaign at the grassroots level, you can help make his bold vision for our future a reality.
We’re looking to get as many donations as we can before our 11:59 PM deadline tonight. Anything you can give to help us stay ahead in this competitive race is greatly appreciated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longshoremenendorsement?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot

clean_body: (Before President Trump takes the stage in Alabama...) | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Peter, We hope that you know how much your support means to President Trump. Again and again, he’s said how much he counts on Grassroots Republicans like you. He’s also said — repeatedly — that he checks his Official Donor List before he walks on stage on Rally Night. We’re not reaching out to everyone, Peter. Only ourTOP REPUBLICANS are getting this email. And that includes you... | | | | | | No one is campaigning harder to take on the Democrats and reclaim the Majority than President Trump. But even he can’t defeat the Left alone. Will you be there, Peter? | Thank you. Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans
