name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need 5,625 conservatives to sign this before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r)
---

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **it 's imperative we're able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I 've set a goal of identifying [100,000 conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have THREE days until August 15th and so far have collected just 77,500 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,625 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58121739:J0cRs4lNf:m:1:3253819041:2B5E6E791E2B91E61D621633E7718633:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our fight is constant
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

The fight _against_ unlawful government secrecy and corruption, and _for_ government transparency is _constant_...and Judicial Watch cannot let up even briefly from our lawsuits and investigations - no matter who occupies the White House or who controls the Congress.
**_[That’s why I hope you will join our fight by making a tax-deductible donation to Judicial Watch now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56404&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTIxMzU4MDg=)_**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56404&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTIxMzU4MDg=)
---

It is a _constant challenge_ battling chronic government secrecy, corrupt politicians and Biden administration bureaucrats..._and this challenge is not getting any easier_.

As the Biden team pursues radical open-borders policies, our ongoing courtroom challenges to sanctuary policies become even more important..._our unrelenting legal pressure in San Francisco has helped bring about change there, and we are pursuing a lawsuit challenging another sanctuary policy in Santa Clara County, California_.

And there's much more than that on our docket today.

For example, to get to the truth behind the Biden-China and Biden-Ukraine scandals we filed 6 lawsuits and 10 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests against U.S. government agencies.

Our litigation has already revealed "smoking gun" evidence that Hunter Biden, while his father was Vice President took no fewer than 23 flights into or out of Joint Base Andrews, which is where Air Force Two and Air Force One are based.

We are now leading a national campaign demanding that the Justice Department appoint a special counsel to investigate _all the facts and evidence_ about Biden family corruption, _including serious allegations that President Joe Biden may have profited from his son Hunter 's sleazy overseas business deals_.

Day in and day out we provide proof that Judicial Watch is more effective exposing _government crimes_ than the weak, divided Congress and the liberal media _combined_!

Just as we did with the Clinton email scandals and the Deep State anti-Trump conspiracy, we are getting important results that go to the heart of the Washington swamp.

These are all _very_ _serious_ issues, and this important _work is not over_.

**_[That’s why I am asking you to support our work by making a tax-deductible donation to Judicial Watch now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56404&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTIxMzU4MDg=)_**

When corrupt and secretive government officials fail to do their duty and serve the cause of justice, it is Judicial Watch who often stands tall (and sometimes alone) for the rule of law.

Whether it's protecting election integrity, challenging sanctuary policies, exposing the improper use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate our children with Critical Race Theory, or investigating charges of corruption against Joe Biden and others _we are having as great an impact on government corruption and secrecy since we opened our doors in 1994_.

We have never worked harder to fight for government transparency and the rule of law, but we cannot carry on our fight against government corruption and secrecy on our own...

. . .which is why I am asking you **_[you to make your best donation to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56404&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTIxMzU4MDg=)_** right now. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

body:
I am leading the way to fix our broken immigration system and end the border crisis.

| Friend,
I am leading the way to fix our broken immigration system and end the border crisis.
As the youngest Republican woman of the 117th Congress, I have visited the border multiple times to investigate and gain the information necessary to create good policy aimed at securing our Southern Border, ending the tragedy of human trafficking, and stopping the cartel's dirty business. [Can I count on your support today to help me end the border crisis?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017K-LWqNFI5VKYNB3XP_02iJ01UPnStArRr96VZD87Ign0fsOeqJyE-DDFCWqnBfc1ktR5suah9TtpYUX7aP_FvISqZxl_pMtO2UCyPr80HWLKJBX6PZDfzW3e4EZ0IK1maXwQnvHRs9mwrOA4_zjjpJNbAmmgxhP6Rj0SCrcd6oAshj65OINHr3mUnmYfiKd&c=qX6ekuDtgEe6PlcsLN7fzHkX7HdVhQbJes2pHCE_qIqpQcRjJLcyjQ==&ch=wTKdvzYB9EvFSi8hD5VbZ6cIVyuk9KA5yw0rG3exHIdqLjFEukd6ug==)

name: Team Greitens
subject: Former St. Louis Police Officer Tom Lake, Shot Twice in 2016 Ambush, Endorses Eric Greitens for US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Former St. Louis Police Officer Tom Lake, Shot Twice in 2016 Ambush, Endorses Eric Greitens for US Senate
---
| In November 2016, St. Louis Police Officer Tom Lake was sitting in his marked patrol car when he was [ambushed & shot twice in the face](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cs11OY0x8HqYpzSbbflO0lFeDhy369XwqDUb7jjWWfuWbG-JGltd2uf8KEvLFzfmPYeE4LHbbIzCR7Eflt8YCup_2DUcmVkTm85Np1jL-2rZydV0yJlgNWOl8C1o__DC1IGW7giZOt8OdDwIgr4ZVti_LnHMMxZhizZwH_CHEwyiJFy9PeWfCnX2m6v0w8kqhqt8wtk5PtmTy4Qqe2-DSlZ9bN_00dd9LDFOYT8WQRwoCZuFDzMUKKmhHCmbuwEenho9xqUdRUkVxDuOBYXn12VOLNY3LmoszEmzurJYHvaExYA9fnnPFg==&c=HJPh_CJPmW50LywFX6l64IP455ZpmsytI7oQr0GpHBNWNGFe7LkO1Q==&ch=ak6IVDk1BGBWqv9e5uC_HuE10_msNC4y3h1HKuQXxSf9luaIuG-msA==) at point blank range.
Lake was immediately rushed to the hospital where he received life-saving treatment. Just a week earlier, Eric Greitens had been elected as Missouri's 56th Governor. As Tom Lake recalls, the Governor-Elect was among the first to come visit him in the hospital but that was far from the last time the two would meet.
In the months and years following the ambush-- and still to this day-- Eric Greitens and Tom Lake stay in touch.
Today, nearly 5 years later, retired officer Tom Lake announced that he would be endorsing Greitens for Missouri's open US senate seat in 2022.
"I remember when he walked into that hospital room, he shakes my hand and looks me dead in the eye and he said: "Tom, whatever you need, we are here for you."
In the video announcement, Lake says, "Then a week later he calls back. It just became common place. Here I am-- I'm just a lonely ol' citizen. I pay my taxes, I go to work, and I try to stay under the radar... and I have the Governor of the State of Missouri calling me, checking on me."
[Greitens has also been publicly endorsed by Sergeant Ann Dorn, widow of Captain David Dorn, who was killed in St. Louis during civil unrest in 2020.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cs11OY0x8HqYpzSbbflO0lFeDhy369XwqDUb7jjWWfuWbG-JGltd2uf8KEvLFzfmTvsDMxHDnRpD3BMpnVbTusY1tJsROnhSgRXV_RXm9OllSZjLww1wugUMvks6W0dMDfNEHla3wwaWCosNKt6NfsfgoaptGyHubHvok8qjcsMmE56ktUGTV_K3SqXTy-zbkd8upi-8b8yKkplVQaRKesY0mHb2VnAmBmjzsqxOzqK412zXMdqWxU5_ssHkU_pvlvyAl7PVDImgIq8itOOAbA==&c=HJPh_CJPmW50LywFX6l64IP455ZpmsytI7oQr0GpHBNWNGFe7LkO1Q==&ch=ak6IVDk1BGBWqv9e5uC_HuE10_msNC4y3h1HKuQXxSf9luaIuG-msA==)
Lake calls Governor Greitens a "champion for law enforcement" and credited Greitens for coming to the front lines in support police officers as Governor.
WATCH the announcement video to hear Officer Lake's incredible story & why he's endorsed Eric Greitens:
---

This is urgent. A brand new public poll of the 2022 Democratic primary for Governor shows Nikki LEADING the democratic primary for governor by 3 points.

Nikki is the frontrunner in this race and the ONLY candidate who can defeat DeSantis next year. Click here to chip in now and help us build on this momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-poll-2]

It’s clear that Florida Democrats are ready to break our state’s rigged system and try something new. After more than 20 years of Republican Governors, we know the same playbook won’t work.

After last week’s poll showed Nikki leading DeSantis among independents in a head-to-head matchup, we know that Nikki can win this race. But we also know this won’t be easy.

Our message continues to resonate across Florida, and we need your help to spread the word. Click here to chip in now and help us win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-poll-2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Thanks for being on our team. Together, we’re going to win.
—Stefanie

Fellow Conservative,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because **[in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculaaJWyfLsaL0Th8J0tvC9Qb3Fgemsah-1ybsMZMab0J4ywoOhy5ghukfRZLgQi39KMxlEzA566hcW4opGlH770lu-oCxn3Z5uBOYClajpX6CrpsXBRA7YzARKQ6kWqT1PVK6pz0CSltBfPpkRYI53S5hBRKvX0e38evfBrlcpoeA0Wb6ir4uUu8btC0BYP4vTEICo2qrVlnF-DRumi7TjoGgynk3XNajg2BxzZ7kLSso%3D)**

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculwKrzna8j3dt1Z9bf_CY7faPVUAl4kiiu9iQ1RpAU1ioXRaSpPVK9qTj8FuSCIqG5N2Khvx3qnIi5mMIaY8Mmk8HEt9CA4pT6pwLpzFLJxSsX873tXwRKt00j-A-ZAE6d7qijMu86CJfgqpV9sE64Ya9MgNLZc7-br6uJNu21yZi5kaIm69hY7wbyaYm4DB9rs7xWqlbPBio626r7EDmvBMn22dBPodjjdCrnGIXp14Y%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEcul1wT4Rj_tO9wPXTxi1i3AM4HBBZYwt9Md2jusWQuCmi8wbvWypzgYOaVBdBYTx83zRmaspj4MneE0VxIrVOpJrahulI5SiglErrvSyRLzw-gNk4NDIGRuFEFaaiI_ILGTXNy9RfCy0isWmbrLXoll6Rrb6PdSFnJCvy3lvX3MFD7_TUGBSCoLxp6lmBgY5M8ZAB9IUULAHnDefU-jV8g07Zs0thkyOcXJ5uXJORTnq8A%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculleZVumcALksWPjQKstpLw01FMAupNFjCcQLFtezj7j5uZoNv_MpOyjyd1Nai1VpIGEHPOlId0IdGku6CaQzRmPCxCRrpG72o8hwudOKrwB385C4lI-ofWB28Jf_mDCpS6neskNJpknfaBrbAU8qSBhPGULW5v6os_QhLA5sEzqQOweTAaQrpyFx6BwmCVKRC4FV1xPPhzO_3lg8aY62KabIwRZzaGXmeuU3k88vGDLk%3D)**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculA-_JpjCr4U4mplr3HivJrMwGkujHUXW-hCSR7zW8cHIVFEc1XGeSU0m8Tk9642C5rD8TJbLUpXOGJ1DKQJeFVgp-WIY4czxs3t75KTaOH7LcCkiKufPXy0BAWghI1jDFz859MVC-gfetSrspn5h6tBLLFYnkTILsDEsELgNDdnpK_LNnaxXLZIwq_-vzoOCx8giHe-PmkJSx1Sk44u0n1oXey55bsTp_-TFv1BLJaTI%3D)
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEcul93Q058_-FcoEtmjJvgPTcg-QtUIp3olyGOD6bQwsXTEc6wWHg20f3oKyzni1NiqZY0MvL_R_0m4qpss3YiakRasJOvXoEFrREqaCOr5k8vnFHzHYPU8vFk9DLVXV2D0jk8FFNlOFbjg87zWvWrLwsU3c5gGzv98WeoCHiXthZI8zT0vWgZT-FyV2oR9QNLBSy4TP0sj5gTzciaGke2vMCagg9WZ55-liTxlQV2TwNSQ%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculxrBuHHd2pgQqx8Ejhdv-XefArn2qh-JZ1I4Et3tjgPLNjNJsEKNIMqM0Zs2iPb7Ylz6Rb8HnELdBiScuzcDiPnSg2xQatm50oGqBGnSevxGUl-JZs19G1jkPQhvqrS4K9S04gj7fBtb9mIWM2VBLlNtDnbEG1t0dd5PxPCgcLE5sGNGYKdd9WArrKrO2mukV4R2G1cw6L6EqKfnG3CC1tiPqouvV0NopiE08NjXGbIM%3D)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculEpQfw1YuQcTYOG0xvBYA363mIvlXWAnm0ALMyf4KT9ZwgvDIcASMHm5HtNbAhwZ1VQ2i2ZQtUvES63IlTca9IwDx0d8eqP-19pmhZaj8op6DwJLwlTzbRT9pAXAxqvtcREcmPGKIK_0x_LtpTmyBoQGeYVT9YgxWbMIyhNp4HG0qMlSzYHahIuPYDUorC4-vXu3SnP-y9Yq7EmwLe5fxMGQcbztGXZxgaqMPA6yMGIE%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=676b9642e45f45748525583890169e74&_e=B9FpZi6l_uY6xj4zGuZw6dz0tBiFpBJaihN9rBGpBJ28hyCZg34bDFliRslM3YkyJpO4N7ak4LnX51Q1I8gQQHMuG5Yf0RDqA0tYepnLNWMFibro2xiZ1xlmYVp4Q4_5hUxpfHb1-S_BrIZb8uTq_OJOXuH8gJyCcXSxcPLY-lVdyu0S6j1l-z6MXoMRfZLclvkGJC3-EbSnLhqhfte2l8vT7VhXNR_dJgu_SPWXMhqrTjV6uEFWVvxf6PeuEculAHNpwpbd2wzXbxdCzFxU7olcK2S8wL_eoK5VRqfu3T6cvZL9Q_WUDO5bjkr6dnzEG-JiMUWU607pVBtEDzdJjZqFvgkSk7XtxAgqeTNpNF7xtqkq6w6CxRybvkNh49WEva6kGlsomwXiwInoCE4_EuBt5Q1u5E2COfBV9LMwgN4jKIfQg_uvb2sEEZ9xv2vaTMSEfTN-C-vzD3_p6eqChH6TLyewoNqSgCbVFRM1SKc%3D)**

Fellow Patriot - I wanted to update you on the progress of our campaign since we started.

We have been so blessed. Friends, family, neighbors, veterans - everyone has shown so much support for my campaign. I want to extend a special thank you to you Fellow Patriot, for being part of my team. The road is long, but I’m glad I have you!

subject: Check our our new ad
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Hyuw1HhzioN8QFHob4d8YyxBvfuAgXTOJC4pj5XUfIPw37DWDDgCLIkSsInky7mOODyf-E-9ujILFyBRYWcfd8U4-ed_Tx7pzPkGm342RcVnSrTOd8YUuF3KnKvs8magw0yhCwQE8SYbHjEduQevH8xSZ_PlkZtfaVvVrIxjmcnF0I6g5qKNg==&c=DiaGsG_9Uj33urJMauo07qkrnwRERgTS_n8PPTWfxqeegbE7mjUABg==&ch=ayKWXTgWbALbbrjRWMbZaxl2DwMBo3qsrARZbcIm5-ZTL6DAdJqquQ==)

| Peter,
Today we are out with a new statewide ad titled "Faith and Football." It will hit the airwaves TODAY.
WATCH: "[Faith and Football](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Hyuw1HhzioN8QFHob4d8YyxBvfuAgXTOJC4pj5XUfIPw37DWDDgCChyMWcCYiHI2-2Oi0u_wa4NdedB8KBRSYSemHLxZtBpTxvwv80v1eTA20WVnCkBBDuUhIpjwku3_PwaGnpL5ke4_JmmGz6UUw==&c=DiaGsG_9Uj33urJMauo07qkrnwRERgTS_n8PPTWfxqeegbE7mjUABg==&ch=ayKWXTgWbALbbrjRWMbZaxl2DwMBo3qsrARZbcIm5-ZTL6DAdJqquQ==)"

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Hyuw1HhzioN8QFHob4d8YyxBvfuAgXTOJC4pj5XUfIPw37DWDDgCLrx8SpDj8ucy2nl6mP47TX0-2aOWeJH1mCbbijcD2QRgm8a1irgdvP_7iAzT_jDOj3hLb41fKDK5xvk6Q5O5gLgIWz630MHoy0Zvx1wbNXjZr0RCb8wQN2vu5p5lzbBKw==&c=DiaGsG_9Uj33urJMauo07qkrnwRERgTS_n8PPTWfxqeegbE7mjUABg==&ch=ayKWXTgWbALbbrjRWMbZaxl2DwMBo3qsrARZbcIm5-ZTL6DAdJqquQ==)
---
| The Left is undermining our country at every opportunity. From irresponsible spending, to calls to defund the police, to the border crisis, and we have to fight for the values that make America great.
Democrats are crushing the American Dream I lived and replacing it with a nightmare. Ohioans are ready for a true conservative Senator who will be fearless in standing up to the radical Left, and I believe I am that person. We have to fight those who want to tear us apart at every turn.
Our nation is under attack and our freedom is at risk. In a matter of 24 hours the Senate spent $4.5 TRILLION (that's $4,500,000,000,000) of our taxpayer dollars on the Democrats' radical agenda.
Just yesterday, Kentucky Sen. Rand Paul was CENSORED by Big Tech execs at YouTube. Sen. Paul had the guts to stand up and speak out against Dr. Fauci's fake claims regarding the efficiency of masks. YouTube didn't like the narrative so they banned him from the platform for a week. This is lunacy and it must be stopped.
No one will fight harder for Ohio. Faith gave me a guide and football gave me grit. As your next U.S. Senator I will defend our values and way of life. I've won on the field and in the boardroom, and together we will win in Washington.
Bring Your Helmet,
---
| Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Condemn hatred whenever you see it and demand justice whenever you can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

It's been four years since white nationalists arrived in Charlottesville, Virginia, and held a "Unite the Right Rally." They stoked hatred and fear. They caused destruction and the tragic death of counter-protester Heather Heyer. Their actions were beyond reprehensible.

Former president Trump claimed these were "very fine people on both sides." His words were hurtful, wrong, and dangerous. Instead of condemning the violent actions of self-proclaimed neo-Nazis, the former president made excuses and fed the flames of hatred. It's no wonder that white supremacists felt emboldened to storm our nation's Capitol building just a few years later.

The words and actions of our leaders have long standing consequences, and they last beyond when those particular leaders leave office. **Our work to fight back against hatred and injustice must continue.**

Peter, hate has no home here. But it's going to take all of us to root out these dangerous ideologies. I remain committed to doing my part and fighting for equality and justice for all and defending our democracy from corruption in Congress.

**I hope you will join me in this fight by condemning hatred whenever you see it and demanding justice whenever you can.**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/v3aU6iZZaizDVQOVhMZi2xVznwgTLBVjBjqhyU-4yCQ=/y0HpiD680a45uOwuWNDUHp1SfdyCaN5blcfwE2zCla4=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/v3aU6iZZaizDVQOVhMZi2xVznwgTLBVjBjqhyU-4yCQ=/gspBDEHiBjqJiPgN6R_E_bpbpTSUIUGUvVsbxHXX_3A=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/v3aU6iZZaizDVQOVhMZi2xVznwgTLBVjBjqhyU-4yCQ=/nQjgRfidPn9xaZQ7D6gPGV0nZEHWgomEvheI0P2eXew=).

body:

---
Peter,

It’s no wonder why Congress is such a mess right now.

_Nancy Pelosi is bowing to the most radical, Socialist voices in her party._

Peter, I’ve had enough –– and I know that I’m not alone.

Real, conservative patriots are needed now more than ever in Washington to keep America First and defend our freedoms for future generations.

**_I can’t think of anyone who fits that description better than Congressman Mike Gallagher._**
|

Real, conservative patriots are needed now more than ever in Washington to keep America First and defend our freedoms for future generations. I can’t think of anyone who fits that description better than Congressman Mike Gallagher. | | Believe me –– America would be in a much better position if everyone in Washington worked as hard for the people as Congressman Gallagher does. He knows how severe the threats facing America are, and his commitment to securing America against Communist China is second to none. I’m with him 100% of the way in this fight. But the truth is, we won’t win if we fail to take back Congress from Nancy Pelosi in the upcoming midterm elections. Sincerely, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Muslim Agenda or America First?
body:
Last week, I was floored when a federal magistrate ordered me to pay $123,000 to the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR).
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/1VtPECjKVj5pGuqnF763EHRQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/1VtPECjKVj5pGuqnF763EHRQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ) Last week, I was floored when a federal magistrate ordered me to pay $123,000 to the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR).

CAIR has been designated as an Islamic terrorist organization by the UAE, and I had sued them for their interference with my life and my work after they lobbied Twitter to ban me.

Now they want their attorney's fees, but it's really another ploy to scare me off and make me want to give up.

But, it had the opposite effect and I'm more determined than ever to win in the upcoming Mid-Term Elections.

[**Send CAIR a message by supporting my race and help me win today!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/1VtPECjKVj5pGuqnF763EHRQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ)

These terrorists will be working to stop me and all other America First candidates while undermining local and state governments with their own "Muslim Agenda" candidates.

CAIR's political arm is a group called Emgage.

Emgage has both a non-profit and a political action committee.

They get-out-the-vote and directly support candidates around the nation - from Congress and the White House to your local city council.

The voter cards they distribute before each election lists their candidates along with a big, red title that reads, "Muslim Agenda Coalition."

For 2021, they've already endorsed candidates in Florida, Michigan, New York, Virginia and even Texas city council races.

While Emgage doesn't say what their "Muslim Agenda" is, I can tell you right now that it's a socialist and pro-Sharia agenda.

Socialism and Sharia go hand-in-hand, and it's often referred to as the Red-Green Axis or the Marxist-Jihadi Alliance.

This is reflected in their past endorsements, which include Bernie Sanders, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib.

With the election of those radicals, we are watching the destruction from the Marxist-Jihadi Alliance playout right before our eyes, at our nation's expense.

Emgage's Anti-American agenda is also reflected in the candidates they opposed, which includes Former Congressman Allen West who ended up in their sights for saying, "We are against something that is a totalitarian theocratic political ideology, and it is called ISLAM."

Anyone who dares to tell the truth about the Muslim Agenda will be on Emgage's radar - and as you can imagine, **I 'm at the top of their list.**

That's why I need your help more than ever.

CAIR and Emgage will realize soon enough that their attempts to shut me down have failed and have only made me even more determined.

And they'll throw everything they have at me, [**so help me stay a few steps ahead by supporting my campaign today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/1VtPECjKVj5pGuqnF763EHRQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ).

You'll show them that you choose America's Agenda over the Muslim Agenda, and you'll give me a BIG boost by [**providing your support**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/1VtPECjKVj5pGuqnF763EHRQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/nzJ763FGDMRkVqNEUZClJhoQ)

name: Tiera Johnson
subject: Democrats called out INGOP's rigged system
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Peter, Indiana Democrats and Hoosier voters last week stood together to accomplish one thing: call out the Indiana Republican Party for holding their so-called "redistricting tour" across Indiana. For too long, the Republican Supermajority at the statehouse has forced Hoosiers like you to have to live with the status quo. Republicans consistently defunded our public schools, waded into unnecessary culture wars, and told our workers that low-wage jobs are the best they can offer us. They are wrong. Indiana Republicans are officially on notice because Democrats and Hoosiers will no longer allow them to rig the system against the future of Indiana. The Indiana Republican Party's extreme partisanship must come to an end. Their "work more for less" economy and constant assault on our institutions is dividing families across Indiana. They have no identity and have lost their moral compass - and they don't deserve to have control of our state government. **[Chip in $10 so we can grow our coalition of candidates who will always stand with working people in Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33952323/300456191/1985140510?refcode=RedistrictUpdate.FR.08.12.21.&RedistrictUpdate.FR.08.12.21.=RedistrictUpdate.FR.08.12.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDYxYTI4Yi1hMmZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BWjtB4-q5U0va7ZQPDtN1mF6C_KMXA4EZmFw4qc_9bo=)**[**. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Peter, Indiana Democrats and Hoosier voters last week stood together to accomplish one thing: call out the Indiana Republican Party for holding their so-called "redistricting tour" across Indiana. For too long, the Republican Supermajority at the statehouse has forced Hoosiers like you to have to live with the status quo. Republicans consistently defunded our public schools, waded into unnecessary culture wars, and told our workers that low-wage jobs are the best they can offer us. They are wrong. Indiana Republicans are officially on notice because Democrats and Hoosiers will no longer allow them to rig the system against the future of Indiana. The Indiana Republican Party's extreme partisanship must come to an end. Their "work more for less" economy and constant assault on our institutions is dividing families across Indiana. They have no identity and have lost their moral compass - and they don't deserve to have control of our state government. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = The best way for us to fight back against the INGOP's partisanship is to elect more hard-working Democrats who will deliver solutions to the problems most important to Hoosier families. This agenda of substance, not ideology, will create a better future for our state. = This has been a proud time for all of us, hopefully, you feel it too. If we can elect 5 more Hoosier Democrats next year, imagine what we could accomplish. name: Mark McCloskey for Senate
subject: “Republicans are white supremacists”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
Last week, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09cead2c4498475eb227d2a40e457686&_e=KcSZJ9U1MMl4TyGPNan5ZScSe18A-YHQzCsLgEYHDH1pWFYhBne2k_3QLP1aMSAmIHzJfsEIK3hXUzpELhTSXXtcNMB5EqhhgEsBlkuSLjsgFepJ3UXnPUez8bkj-WHtxdadZb7qVv01Z1ha_t8u2o52XVa5DHNlUbGJdK9ElRAWan3dkN77Kr2p9afxd8jmkebX_tEz7uaG45kfEAxrc-LNSuJXCCMJ-KJ2mN110Q8Xe-BxfSANoR8ZoreXLPkQ08bEofk7vdHdSH8iSbxP6VYquDlmJz2lPgQC3KizLL13HI1gzBB9oaDegYKxgO_7HMLgzm71KBgdY0CdriGLbUKBwQ7ExRsBWE_fCuOrvFxFAXAMvg_D5SnSj_bafvw0BD5bjxt-v9-gCLJjzTSbhSnn19Lpox3ArHmTdODCf-lfsSqGtkTHSj8CIo5L4-42mNJ20q_rms1Heo-Ytrfb2FyLDkhSwHiAzk3Ce-amZOVmtwKQemhZkf4Jn2ADzMSctkEb39HFN1PgQFY_SGYZ_PNf9_b9Ea58B0Ock4Pe5jcblag24e0Bl4nvU7pPuY1jovKZX7_m-eb33Gd6g2dxCYzZ9Erit15vzjnyfybHHYY%3D)
---

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09cead2c4498475eb227d2a40e457686&_e=KcSZJ9U1MMl4TyGPNan5ZScSe18A-YHQzCsLgEYHDH1pWFYhBne2k_3QLP1aMSAmIHzJfsEIK3hXUzpELhTSXXtcNMB5EqhhgEsBlkuSLjsgFepJ3UXnPUez8bkj-WHtxdadZb7qVv01Z1ha_t8u2o52XVa5DHNlUbGJdK9ElRAWan3dkN77Kr2p9afxd8jmkebX_tEz7uaG45kfEAxrc-LNSuJXCCMJ-KJ2mN110Q8Xe-BxfSANoR8ZoreXLPkQ08bEofk7vdHdSH8iSbxP6VYquDlmJz2lPgQC3KizLL13HI1gzBB9oaDegYKxgO_7HMLgzm71KBgdY0CdriGLbUKBwQ7ExRsBWE_fCuOrvFxFAXAMvg_D5SnSj_bafvw0BD5bjxt-v9-gCLJjzTSbhfK58STyYJCMBbf_EnCpt7x_HVmM7CR12Ls2hn-uNeHju8-z2MLKqFETpwu83ssha4P3S1uyGD9lllpjDdo8wmNWpdZkV4DUXvEAMABXYhsGnWBltwsliAUSPnzxjaZHCIf4WzorbSuB_BnFUY_2ozYNTlBEWr-1yS0MXSmxnGBS3gPKA6U_llzapC4V1RgDmSbU5GvfoMTh-LmweZ-TmBE%3D)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09cead2c4498475eb227d2a40e457686&_e=KcSZJ9U1MMl4TyGPNan5ZScSe18A-YHQzCsLgEYHDH1pWFYhBne2k_3QLP1aMSAmIHzJfsEIK3hXUzpELhTSXXtcNMB5EqhhgEsBlkuSLjsgFepJ3UXnPUez8bkj-WHtxdadZb7qVv01Z1ha_t8u2o52XVa5DHNlUbGJdK9ElRAWan3dkN77Kr2p9afxd8jmkebX_tEz7uaG45kfEAxrc-LNSuJXCCMJ-KJ2mN110Q8Xe-BxfSANoR8ZoreXLPkQ08bEofk7vdHdSH8iSbxP6VYquDlmJz2lPgQC3KizLL13HI1gzBB9oaDegYKxgO_7HMLgzm71KBgdY0CdriGLbUKBwQ7ExRsBWE_fCuOrvFxFAXAMvg_D5SnSj_bafvw0BD5bjxt-v9-gCLJjzTSbhRZ569Z5d_J2OJafOE1QiqjqHln0AKEr879VfNqtFqN0bPs9-QDdhAfzws47J07Ic1wQpSDLKoPPDPWDZMuIAFeJxS4_pKldhPorZ27GKf7tYkGCCzWNDHtXusSGXrPY8yO6fDZFRutTp68Zxhj8PgJ1f6_8fwhdn3bQ_5EfUiL3XyRlUGl85k--8PV3h4RIe9BZOG--J1Brg0G2nam4ieY%3D)

clean_body: Last week, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

Fellow American - we need conservative leaders in Congress, now more than ever.

We need fighters who won’t back down from putting America FIRST.

**That’s why we must re-elect my friend, Dr. Greg Murphy for Congress in the great state of North Carolina.**

[I’M IN: LET’S WIN](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=05ea2be3a99744eca9511fd3a879a8cb&_e=Tv1gL3oNvhZzFt3E9cRJhegIMUHc6oa8lVsZcFaMIrxEIU_CyghMeoTSzTwv7EIPE0j676M2Dnh0cPz535hPcWJmKL01akup_3tLL3s6jGefnyCGwriSPl9zvqh2h27EqhPrzH8_d85JBYI83Lhniz9imJR1wmaTk6tlV2au8YltDhZRycnGb-BwSYGNk_PRB6DZCw4D_rj32kPgM88N9hr86kLOPCvAAoAv2U0SwUYeiPHkGkT4NnC6Sf-wlaMRX5Pl-1fTxM8fLSRhFpD78YZBGFM8VGtpSmcNkXoduC1X5WCN0gQi3epjW7zezMffPMMSIut4CR2sqObCTIbuoedLomAyKWanZ7NI39xerMJ7gDBiuwdxzklZziIuK5ov)

Congressman Murphy proudly protects the second amendment, advocates for the lives of the unborn, and fights for lower taxes for all American families. Dr. Murphy worked closely with President Trump on Operation Warp Speed to help protect Americans from the COVID virus!

While Democrats do everything they can to divide our great nation and gain power for themselves, what we need is unity - which is why I’m so proud to have someone like Dr. Murphy in Congress, who shares our Republican values.

_But we run the threat of losing that unity and Dr. Murphy’s important seat!_

The Radical Left is targeting southern states like never before, dumping millions into typically red strong-hold states like North Carolina. Democrats know the south is the key to the 2022 midterm elections, _but so do we._

[**Fellow American, can I count on you to make a critical contribution today to help re-elect my friend Dr. Greg Murphy, and protect the south from the Democrats' attacks?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=05ea2be3a99744eca9511fd3a879a8cb&_e=Tv1gL3oNvhZzFt3E9cRJhegIMUHc6oa8lVsZcFaMIrxEIU_CyghMeoTSzTwv7EIPE0j676M2Dnh0cPz535hPcWJmKL01akup_3tLL3s6jGefnyCGwriSPl9zvqh2h27EqhPrzH8_d85JBYI83Lhniz9imJR1wmaTk6tlV2au8YmCNpfUFmBO3V3cSuEGylVOYFxVFeSvZX3kTiw9EVaQKV40xHHjtGWVbJLztZsPT_tKLwNobcCP3lo4ip6hZ6iLuHGtdrJb1-h7kbb0TCz3Qy_l_221TN6vLmCM2_H5VyCM-DmsgbHNyDe4OWf3PZ2GlHlsODeL0j-WYGAAP62t4QzHX2Jusy6-2q99u1CQ6ynF-V6Jmhrq89dakUI_Au4M)

[I’M IN: LET’S WIN](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=05ea2be3a99744eca9511fd3a879a8cb&_e=Tv1gL3oNvhZzFt3E9cRJhegIMUHc6oa8lVsZcFaMIrxEIU_CyghMeoTSzTwv7EIPE0j676M2Dnh0cPz535hPcWJmKL01akup_3tLL3s6jGefnyCGwriSPl9zvqh2h27EqhPrzH8_d85JBYI83Lhniz9imJR1wmaTk6tlV2au8YnDFT5M_v35Gxq2Z-6PZmTp6EQ8z92lUDFO-CsJK8m2_PTj-uiqRFRV2XSa9TMhJTtHT2K6qLBAFUVBf5E22kXZFB7oNcLkLZttgvGkIrbSaDU7yCzlhg9lmo7XxnwxZSOaWa26tNySTylkt0r0BdsfLZC19r0EQRazgwmmASZDpnbqq4GU5VG_RxR-ulK0ppHkfIHv-GZqBkco98rgtMC5)

Democrats gained complete and utter power in 2020 - and it’s tearing this country apart. We need strong, resolute, thought leaders, who represent real Americans. Re-electing Dr. Greg Murphy will help exponentially in securing the House in 2022. [**Will you join me in supporting him today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=05ea2be3a99744eca9511fd3a879a8cb&_e=Tv1gL3oNvhZzFt3E9cRJhegIMUHc6oa8lVsZcFaMIrxEIU_CyghMeoTSzTwv7EIPE0j676M2Dnh0cPz535hPcWJmKL01akup_3tLL3s6jGefnyCGwriSPl9zvqh2h27EqhPrzH8_d85JBYI83Lhniz9imJR1wmaTk6tlV2au8YkiTQU70pBQP3AtrXEK7-klcJ5-Kv2mxaQHlJt21PgTOISyV9os1Bvl4DOnjYl1VYeRmOABKTj0EzbVniZJCoqeWY5S54N0Gxk1yBIh44agddgmhyanmjyVhzhCnJXOFnxCg2IMFyY8TsiEh2wPvklVkIOraFAnMPpdew0tKyVXiQdxvaIqexNZppQ8e5QQ29lETQnv7d2A0szYILW5lNmr)

name: =?utf-8?Q?TinaRamirez.com?=
subject: The Biden Infrastructure Bill
body:
or the Green New New Deal. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=ad0a36f316&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

Over this past week, the Biden Infrastructure Bill got voted on and passed in both the House and Senate. This 2,701 page bill is _40,000 words longer_ than the novel Moby Dick and would take _49 straight hours_ to read!

Do you believe that any of the politicians who voted yes, read this bill? Shouldn’t we expect our legislators to at least read bills before shoving them through?

Even worse, this 1.2 TRILLION DOLLAR bill only has 10% that is “actual infrastructure”. Where is the rest of the 90% going? Can we even call it an “infrastructure” bill?

We need legislators that will ACTUALLY read our bills, not just blindly support what their party leaders tell them to do, like Abigail Spanberger.
---
[CONTRIBUTE TO AN HONEST LEGISLATOR ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=dfe7298272&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| But look, here are some other “infrastructure” items, included in this $1,200,000,000,000 bill:
* A per-mile user fee pilot program. Why are we paying so much money, when they are going to tax you again?
* The single largest investment in green energy
* Upgrading school buses and ferries to use electric power
* Strict tax regulations on cryptocurrency

We know Tina would do the right thing and not vote until she read the whole bill to make sure that this is best for the people of her district.

She understands what it takes to write policy and how to work across the aisle. She previously developed policies while working for the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom and as a Foreign Policy Advisor for numerous members of Congress. She even helped start and direct the bi-partisan Congressional International Religious Freedom Caucus.

We need legislators like Tina, not blind puppet politicians.
---
[CONTRIBUTE TO AN HONEST LEGISLATOR ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=b172894f6d&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| Thank you,

Team Tina
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO AN HONEST LEGISLATOR ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=23eb9c877d&e=ae0ea222da)

---

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Standing for Election Integrity!
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jWHvMTvDErygQCWyszuFf6ysI3HtZrT99d_fl5Zz40UOymjQ6gt0UhRgro1VbV-6BoDHq60P--FYuT6ROReNaFn_0cKfnHHutMwOkZo4GKFAJLOjvea3a7yIKRUXvzOIaZ0RdLZq4OnOMyuYdv9uHBEtTKTxQgBzT99qG4c2BRHIHhIIh19pNuE6zDv-iPMV&c=4SX8ihwuAqM14cXxhUuW6tdHp3QPTd0Mvn3JnTM4cpxdfVPblUdH3w==&ch=fI5sK0Pdi7ySO2-8gzEltir4uLcPdCu1-qj8cIZg1rZqiIXQNkA7QQ==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
There is nothing more important in our republic than ensuring that our elections are free and fair - as Americans, we need to KNOW that our voices at the ballot box are being secured!
In the past, we heard lip service from liberals like AOC, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer talking about the need for secure elections... But all of a sudden they've changed their tune, and don't want anything to do with verifying that our elections are safe and transparent.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: “Code red for humanity”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends ––
Did you see this news from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) this week?
In case you haven’t, here were the key takeaways:
* It is unequivocal that human influence has warmed the atmosphere, ocean and land.
* In the years ahead we will continue to see hotter temperatures, rising sea levels, and more extreme weather events.
* The UN Secretary General called the report “code red for humanity.”

It’s clear to me after seeing this report that no community will be able to hide from the impacts of the human-driven climate crisis.
Instead, we must organize and listen to the scientists demanding action on climate. The IPCC made it clear that the only way we can hope to mitigate this will be through bold steps to reduce carbon emissions.
**To say it another way: we need a Green New Deal.**
[**So join me today and add your name next to mine to tell Congress it’s time to take bold action on climate change. It’s up to all of us to take action to end this crisis, and your support will go a long way towards showing Congress that this issue is a top priority.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/climate_change/?source=em210812-1-15&t=1&akid=236%2E159979%2ESz-_jI)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/climate_change/?source=em210812-1-15&t=2&akid=236%2E159979%2ESz-_jI)**
California has long led the nation on climate action. We’ve endured unprecedented wildfires and extreme weather events, and have taken important steps to address this existential threat.
Now we need the rest of the nation to join California in the fight to preserve our land, air, and water for generations to come.
Thank you for adding your name and taking climate change seriously.
—Alex
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/climate_change/?source=em210812-1-15&t=3&akid=236%2E159979%2ESz-_jI)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=236%2E159979%2ESz-_jI)

clean_body: [] Dear Friend, Remember when Trump said he thought American airports "are like from a third world country" when touting his bigly plans for infrastructure on the campaign trail? Well, the Senate just actually committed to making a huge investment in our nation's infrastructure, a truly exciting step forward. All except 30 Senators voted for the bill. Among that 30 is -- you guessed it -- Sen. Toomey, the perpetual disappointment of Pennsylvania. [] Toomey and his fellow "no"s don't believe in spending our tax dollars to ensure that Americans have safe bridges, highways, drinking water, and public transportation. They resist investing in critical projects in our ports and airports, in increasing electric vehicles and access to broadband. America deserves better. Pennsylvanians deserve better. Help us at Keystone Progress Education Fund as we work toward better by mobilizing voters to ensure we elect candidates who will build up our communities, not vote against our best interests. Please donate $10 today so that we can continue our critical work in the coming key elections. Every dollar helps. body:

Peter,
The US Census Bureau's redistricting data just dropped which means the race to draw political maps has officially begun . Many other states have already been holding public hearings and convening with community members, but not Tennessee — Republicans are afraid of our state becoming younger and more diverse, especially in urban and suburban areas.
This means they will once again try to rig our political maps and secure another decade of power through gerrymandering, not through what voters want.
You can bet that your Tennessee Democratic Party will pursue legal action against every gerrymandered map Republicans draw.
Can you chip in $25 now to help us get ahead in the fight against Republican gerrymandering in Tennessee? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Gerrymandering is absolutely a form of voter suppression and Republicans will do everything they can to keep voters, particularly people of color, from having a voice in the political process.
Right now the GOP controls over two-thirds of the seats in both chambers of our state legislature, but they do not represent two-thirds of voters. In the last three presidential elections, Democratic candidates won an average of 36% of votes, yet Democrats only control 26% of the State House and 18% of the State Senate.
The GOP created an artificial majority for themselves through partisan gerrymandering — we can't allow them to get away with it again.
The clock is ticking — Will you donate now so we can fight for fair districts that are responsive to the will of the voters? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

[**Friends — we’re respectfully asking you to make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210812-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1137_6688874_8Vob4I&akid=1137%2E6688874%2E8Vob4I)
Sorry to be so blunt, but we need to add 1,500 contributions today to help us stay on track to reach our fundraising goal this month.
Hitting this goal is so important for two reasons:
1. Last month, CNN named us one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
2. Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

These are the latest signs that Trump and National Republicans are ramping up their involvement in our race heading into 2022.
In order to keep up the pace, we’re going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
**So as Trump and National Republicans swoop in to try and flip this seat, we have to ask:**

Peter,

We’ve got some good news and bad news. The good news is, we’ve had great fundraising numbers this month from donors like you pitching in to help our movement.**Small dollar donations add up and it’s because of everyone in our grassroots base that this campaign is so strong a whole year out from our primary.[Any amount you contribute makes a difference to us and helps keep us so strong. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33956804/300473465/-592872436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2Q0Mzc1OS1iMGZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0LDCK6fK_omHDIQ926RTc2eE2hNDXmPciJog7UTqCY=)**

The bad news is, we’ve got a lot of reports this week in the media that makes us really worried about the future of California’s 8th district. On Monday, the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) released its sixth report. **The U.N. Secretary General has called the report a “code red for humanity.” **
This district is on the frontlines of the climate crisis and we know just how important it is that we take real action now. Unfortunately, there aren’t a lot of people in Congress willing to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and fight for the just transition we need. **You and I both know that a Trump-backed freshman is the last person who’s going to fight for climate action.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christopher=20Ekstrom?=
subject: Defeat the 19 RINO Senators
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
We have too many traitors in the Senate |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=690df426ab&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

Some of them, you knew were rotten.

Some, are new to the list of the RINO traitors in the Senate.

Together, they helped pass a pork-laden $1.2 trillion bill, that is loaded down with bad Socialist policy that our grandchildren will pay for- and will cause inflation today.

Are you angry yet? [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f2785563f7&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden and the radical Left- not helping Biden pass his agenda.

Have you heard of the betrayal this week? 19 Republican Senators (including lots from safe seats) joined with the Dems to pass a HUGE infrastructure bill. This is one of Biden's biggest policy objectives, and as usual, there is more here than it seems.

_Hidden in its 2702 pages are plans to implement a pilot program to track your vehicle miles for a new highway tax. The proposed plan will also enable the US government to track where you’ve been and your favorite hangouts.

Trump ripped Mitch McConnell on Tuesday over his support for the infrastructure bill.

Trump called McConnell “the most overrated man in politics.”

Trump ended by saying McConnell is working “hard to give Biden a victory” — and warned they are going for “the biggest tax increases in history” next._

As usual, President Trump is right. This is a boondoggle, filled with new taxes like a per-mile driving tax, kneecapping crypto-currency, and more. 2,700 pages of pork and Dem objectives and it was only made possible by weak Republicans.

Remember this when someone tells you a "bad Republican is better than a good Democrat". They are not.

I’m sick & tired of moderate/RINO one-way loyalty! RICHARD SHELBY actually back-stabbed our Conservative candidate for a damn Socialist Abortion supporter in 2018! But these (R)INO scumbags seek to enable the Socialist Agenda & ruin America!

[Will you help us defeat these traitor RINOs?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c924edf9cf&e=ba6e67b849)
---
|
---
| Some voted to convict Trump. Some voted for the Dems' pork-filled COVID bill that spent nothing to stop COVID. Many voted for Biden's awful nominees. Now some voted for the Biden's infrastructure bill.

**We cannot trust the Republicans in the Senate to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. We need to primary the worst offenders and remove them from office- it's the only way to whip the rest into line. **

The Dems don't have this problem. They all fall in line when time comes. They all voted against all of Trump's nominees, every one. We are sending the wrong people to DC.

We have been sending choir boys- but we need more America First fighters!

[Help us make an example](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7e17076270&e=ba6e67b849) of the RINOs by defeating them in primaries. _Trump is still fighting the Dems, and America needs us to join the battle!_

A RINO will always betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. [They are good for nothing, and need to be replaced!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=58922c9a2d&e=ba6e67b849)

We will ONLY support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump and against the Dems' agenda! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial so we can hold them accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b7172d68d1&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates us. They want to ignore us and do whatever the heck they want. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=a2cfb6c490&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=070ac9cc59&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. We must defeat these enemies of the Republic!! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1a4fbb798f&e=ba6e67b849)

name: Jose Castillo
subject: Obama’s birthday bash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS
body:
The last time I checked we still lived in the United States of America where we have personal freedoms and liberties. The last time I checked we still lived in the United States of America where we have personal freedoms and liberties. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99fa3c0e96fa4f778459f82e99a9591b&_e=82q9RMK9vZAlP5rt_Ipgdc986zS9svwlu8-_1cgVZ7S6lztNHxePmwqlnn2HfnZ_NLXrW5lOn59c0GfwhPu2Z902So4F3gbyKq24KO8TI4Ncf3GbZ7QlW4zBPF5vlQVYSOg--7QnPFCR7yHq7L0MsHrrDuUNIt3846D3-NPTqYi-f079FeuO8j67-FXR_cz8ND4m2RZ_3vesY-_B3BH9ShZDDbJU0lEVW7kHvTu0XmFZTYCGTgz17JrMKXaJb95PUqhZFk6D9DQh60nPShMMwrbB8AHoXP2kKQDYrzSSqMTnpbZPmIJYc-oP3XqO1oEUPZJvNbkKUHzxgY7lmCgXpHND8txiNpLY8NCNHsjyO4-YywM2TPqtb3m-aMy_AlooplLwrzy2n9g8dJl8NvoUrT9mGoZq3-jxCUXF9CjmYU3TR_ryKv1xCKU9lFFsK6t0WtBonqInrgIRaSiBLDUMBIITZpKhDF6i1nHL8DzMmJw%3D)

---
Peter,

Across the country, our kids are being forced to wear masks to school. Our freedoms are being stripped by the government mandating vaccines in order to work... but Barack Obama can throw a huge birthday bash with no masks and hide it through a photography ban and forcing attendees to delete the evidence.

**_Funny how the fake new media is silent on this one._**

When it comes time to vote, remember how your weddings were canceled and your businesses were closed down by the Democrat party – who all went to celebrate Obama’s 60th birthday with no masks and no mandates. All the while, you were being forced to wear a mask.

**_What a sham._**

[**< < Make Congress Republican Again >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99fa3c0e96fa4f778459f82e99a9591b&_e=82q9RMK9vZAlP5rt_Ipgdc986zS9svwlu8-_1cgVZ7S6lztNHxePmwqlnn2HfnZ_NLXrW5lOn59c0GfwhPu2Z902So4F3gbyKq24KO8TI4Ncf3GbZ7QlW4zBPF5vlQVYSOg--7QnPFCR7yHq7L0MsHrrDuUNIt3846D3-NPTqYi-f079FeuO8j67-FXR_cz8ND4m2RZ_3vesY-_B3BH9ShZDDbJU0lEVW7kHvTu0XmFZTYCGTgz17JrMKXaJb95PUqhZFk6D9DQh60nPShMMwjn8eHgSAiH2xuNQzsSrcWjzLM6xzEuXlbVIugNJuAlUKeSwQlNQEP4U240Te7N7IVApz0J93t2gtf9stmeE-MbVS479BSUD1Gtk7sgLSeqwtsAM7hMk_ANfpYR63QUm23fvBcNDkErMf0kVFHnUVrLRCSDKPDIk6o_9F2tEXNOJUtZWD9x2KxmOkTuZ5JvpYGHmxRWSWjUITgUvqUZhZCo%3D)
The last time I checked we still live in the United States of America where we have personal freedoms and liberties.

[**Peter, if you are as angry as I am, will you please join me in the fight to save America and Make Congress Republican Again? I need at least 6,000 conservatives who value freedom and liberty to chip in to help me win Florida’s 9th congressional district and flip this seat RED.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99fa3c0e96fa4f778459f82e99a9591b&_e=82q9RMK9vZAlP5rt_Ipgdc986zS9svwlu8-_1cgVZ7S6lztNHxePmwqlnn2HfnZ_NLXrW5lOn59c0GfwhPu2Z902So4F3gbyKq24KO8TI4Ncf3GbZ7QlW4zBPF5vlQVYSOg--7QnPFCR7yHq7L0MsHrrDuUNIt3846D3-NPTqYi-f079FeuO8j67-FXR_cz8ND4m2RZ_3vesY-_B3BH9ShZDDbJU0lEVW7kHvTu0XmFZTYCGTgz17JrMKXaJb95PUqhZFk6D9DQh60nPShMMwlAZnckOK5iaDavvDJQQ_jdN4sfhyDjArOJeLubNuC-1jVqwoQEBH1yBF5KakxQH-TnPLjFpS1p4H_XgEXa8meTQXqbwKSfDoNPbNraS7H9k30rmz3iq51ZuTnHeLPS_sT0Qme44REBkckDkeLLcnm6Zn8xsi3fNK3nzUV2TR1e2PjPzOSNCMlRl_wXtvhN9J4VHd6EHsnskrxdW-mxUznA%3D)

**_If we don’t act now, Biden and the Left will continue to push the envelope until we are fully a socialist country._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Erica=20Smith=2C=20Future=20Generations?=
subject: Erica Smith is a Future Generations Candidate!
body:
Erica is running for U.S. Senate 2022 in battleground state, North Carolina! Are you ready for the 51st vote? 🙋📢 | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=be116af856&e=66979298f9)
---
| | | Hi there, it’s Erica Smith, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.

What an honor to receive the official endorsement of Future Generations PAC as we fight together for urgent grassroots change like reparations, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal!

I’ll just be upfront with you: I’m the only candidate in this competitive Democratic primary running unapologetically on this bold, progressive platform.

If you’re with me, can you please make a donation of $10 or more to our campaign today? We need all the help we can get and a donation of any amount has a direct and immediate impact on our campaign.

---
| [DONATE $10](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1f0146b6a4&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $10")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=171a753f13&e=66979298f9)
---
| I’m a lifelong North Carolinian — as well as an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state senator. I know what it means to struggle. But growing up, our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith. I'm not asking you to "believe it." I am speaking my truth. I am speaking OUR truth. All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for a living wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.

In fact, the struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families face today. We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods.

That is why I’m running for the U.S. Senate — to create opportunities for communities like mine. No community overlooked, no one counted out. Together we can win a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, reparations, and so much more.

If elected, I will fight like hell for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state on the federal level, let alone in the U.S. Senate!

Having support from Future Generations PAC is critical to the success of your campaign — but having your support is even more important. Can you please make a donation of $10 or more to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate today?
---
| [DONATE $10](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3349fb0051&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $10")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8390e1da49&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER")
---
|
---
| Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
****
Erica
_Erica Smith for U.S. Senate_

---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ea7cb9d083&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f26a0e8b66&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1a13cb5cc5&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6f63780963&e=66979298f9)
---

Future Generations PACPO BOX 362PALO PINTO, TX 76484

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=774437a462) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=774437a462).

name: Cicely Davis
subject: I’m a Black Republican
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am a Black Republican running to retire squad member, Ilhan Omar. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=01f6ab4e406c40c3a96e4b82805666f7&_e=smxuvw5d4-dslTJMfgpwmV0lnfIBptfkRWJ1CPgKzeE6GRu_XpeNfYhfJa-XYdFz7gEdfB5tJiVXkOJ8PzwHhUmYqOqPQT-ghE0RbjfjLcrc1LLcwpxz41lKZGm5Kpj_Q65vGwc45BhZCPnLpqg7t0v3dIen71ca0NA3efH9l-ro91iSMf3NSDLHf3IlPYBrPdPodSElsuc19jSmuaB5Waqjrdhtdtys2LENs-Djnu7y7JcOKY1HSmT9Y8OJaVm3F04YIPPh9-72iJtxLbN4l-p7Lq0vrm964-Ljc0u8ZPNS6gk01Sv6wPqKCoLM81mX0M4-Ya1dNqLjfbDnH4W_beiMjTneG5upqAfoMv6SKMhy_bT3Me6VFupdNy6K61uOkCwP4WEhbqAcEPEIMSWB12prWuGz2tqn02sCGs5RSWt4kJaLlUCx6lR_WmGiJuxkI8eO-GdSNdgrWwp_fe1WqxTrKnGSZrXWcZNxV4wehdw%3D)

**Say it with me fellow conservative, Black Americans can be Republican too.**
We need to make sure this message rings loud and clear for everyone to hear because so many liberals in our country seem to think you can’t be a Black American and Republican too. You and I both know that’s not the case because I’m living proof of that, along with so many others in our party.

But, if you told any liberal right now that Black American’s have some of the most Conservative values compared to any other ethnic group in our nation, **they wouldn’t believe you.**

I guarantee you that most of these liberals wouldn’t even believe **the fact that the first Black Americans in Congress were actually Republicans.**

body:
Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c378%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CjCkpIgJKUDQz4gWGrBKLQ&sysid=1)
Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite. That's why they're censoring my video...
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65964%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V4yu7qfYnEEwmolUb7XzUg&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65975%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ymvsY13wNNR6ZXavz0gYVA&sysid=1)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65976%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fMszocykHC6DRRkKhEP%2fJw&sysid=1)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Friend, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65977%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iYNauaRxtMrY8RZxP1gwXg&sysid=1)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65978%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1T0KOdUjIvTmSUwer67hTg&sysid=1)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65979%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MchopxXoCc8%2boCCrlTB5oQ&sysid=1)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65970%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HwHsnMIGZPB6G0j9MSDO5Q&sysid=1)
We must put an end to these fake "fact-checks" and get back to real science.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: reflections from my birthday (thank you!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDLGko72UomhyKxgcx8nueDIUGZxbkR3TSMYmvUBjz4=/qliE6M94vB6ryaRqpYrh_Fdzk_91vTcxF10wp0TKNaA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210812-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

On my birthday, Adam and the girls shared a card with me with thoughtful messages collected from people living in the district, across Virginia, and in states all over the country! I am grateful to have read your kind words and thankful for your contributions; they are vital to us building a successful campaign -- so thank you.

This was my third birthday as a member of Congress, and I am honored to spend another year in this position, working for the Central Virginian community, which I love. I hope to spend many more birthdays representing our community and striving for progress in areas that matter -- like expanding rural broadband, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and helping small businesses.

It means the world to me that supporters like you not only believe in this campaign but also believe in the work my team and I are doing to serve the people of Central Virginia. Your support is essential in allowing us to enact meaningful change.

[_**While you already helped make my birthday a memorable one with the thoughtful card I received, I hope you 'll also consider contributing to support my campaign. We have a competitive re-election race approaching, and your support is essential in allowing our campaign to succeed.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDLGko72UomhyKxgcx8nueDIUGZxbkR3TSMYmvUBjz4=/qliE6M94vB6ryaRqpYrh_Fdzk_91vTcxF10wp0TKNaA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210812-1-EM&amount=25)

Abigail Spanberger

Derek —

In late July, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally.

During the rally he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

It's clear he and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to take back this seat.

We set a goal of raising $25,000 before Trump left the state to help fight back and keep Mark in the Senate. _But we didn’t raise as much as we’d hoped._

**We need to raise an additional $10,000 today to close the gap and get us in a better position to respond to the attacks that are coming our way from all angles.**

clean_body: | | | Derek — In late July, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally. During the rally he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” It's clear he and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to take back this seat. We set a goal of raising $25,000 before Trump left the state to help fight back and keep Mark in the Senate. But we didn’t raise as much as we’d hoped. We need to raise an additional $10,000 today to close the gap and get us in a better position to respond to the attacks that are coming our way from all angles. Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hold this seat. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us next. Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you! Team Kelly | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . This critical piece of legislation is heading to the House — and Donald Trump is using all his power to block it. In fact, he even said it would be “very hard” to endorse any Republican who votes to pass it. And we’re already seeing weak Republicans bend to his will. = in 10 voters approve of Biden’s bipartisan infrastructure bill. But Donald Trump doesn’t care about helping Americans — for him, it’s about destroying every piece of Biden’s plan. This isn’t the first time Trump’s threatened Biden’s plans, and it won’t be the last. name: Matt Jacobs, Candidate for U.S. Congress (CA-26)
subject: Share your thoughts on Cori Bush
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Cori Bush calls for defunding the police...while hiring private security for herself. Peter, Cori Bush, the liberal activist-turned-Congresswoman, has repeatedly called to “defund the police.” But that hasn’t stopped her from using campaign funds to pay for her own personal security. The hypocrisy is indefensible: “ _Security for me, but not for thee.”_ [**I’d love to hear your thoughts on this****, **](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=87bd7ccc55084b209c7523ac2d5fdccd&_e=hgIWxdp0MOnReN_tlOpP_w-FQgklgK6niqQwNRxdKdQs0S1XqsUFJh-GjzwDqPzqHgyz4yYet_CKOSuYxQnM76H599xxyF9HBkgUTO_JuStNu50wMADpX1Cy8Q0vRn9Gea6P8Z9fCQd-r3cBUoZVGkKcpAzhTmptYqvEYQkYBuO66DJrYdlysBUtQkJC-vvCyy18dwaNXiWtSZOZ5FiRkjZfG-0LJjpYuT3tjd7bs5C6J0MGKi4p5wIUkV-iSxl7qUwK5KglT-eyfaEcAgkyCgyWLuRhBdJwZrHAA-AGL3v78k20mzSCT07DD9aVFq7dyXz08h1toQ0lem_LHy5_QpEvYIBqP6uRTT_-XtZyB01dzQgvU4535_h4CnuRxlLCq2L3D5sTfUe7iSgLHFS1zjk71Zzf2LFfRH0wpRoKptqMkH3Yup2cf_L_XBsaAQqfLuHJjNb7YmIk0QUBWCVUgiwOeprj_YC4Vp1wci3GziSSeQ_fenPCcvTbyMtzSMU5)[**Peter.**** Please take this quick 1-question poll**:](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=87bd7ccc55084b209c7523ac2d5fdccd&_e=hgIWxdp0MOnReN_tlOpP_w-FQgklgK6niqQwNRxdKdQs0S1XqsUFJh-GjzwDqPzqHgyz4yYet_CKOSuYxQnM76H599xxyF9HBkgUTO_JuStNu50wMADpX1Cy8Q0vRn9Gea6P8Z9fCQd-r3cBUoZVGkKcpAzhTmptYqvEYQkYBuO66DJrYdlysBUtQkJC-vvCyy18dwaNXiWtSZOZ5FiRkjZfG-0LJjpYuT3tjd7bs5C6J0MGKi4p5wIUkV-iSxl7qUwK5KglT-eyfaEcAgkyCgyWLuRhBdJwZrHAA-AGL3uL2sflq3cdRSlnzsCceEI8hf3c8lp-LSa-GfZQYEmqwGNomTPL3-2oeQT2PLMwNS9SekXWtB5faB5FTNd_bCayebHdsWfl9ajFNBa5F6kpqDKZGywx4Y_N8WnDASJqA9ZZjLQA1n2oRtg3SJA7y7uvPCux8HDDCP3huNhTKKdCowQnDRPlaP6UYfBbySignSxyAsWx07USjpyypMRnoIVX) **Do you think it's wrong for a Member of Congress to use campaign funds for personal security, while fighting to defund the police?**

✅[YES](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=87bd7ccc55084b209c7523ac2d5fdccd&_e=hgIWxdp0MOnReN_tlOpP_w-FQgklgK6niqQwNRxdKdQs0S1XqsUFJh-GjzwDqPzqHgyz4yYet_CKOSuYxQnM76H599xxyF9HBkgUTO_JuStNu50wMADpX1Cy8Q0vRn9Gea6P8Z9fCQd-r3cBUoZVGkKcpAzhTmptYqvEYQkYBuO66DJrYdlysBUtQkJC-vvCyy18dwaNXiWtSZOZ5FiRkjZfG-0LJjpYuT3tjd7bs5C6J0MGKi4p5wIUkV-iSxl7qUwK5KglT-eyfaEcAgkyCgyWLuRhBdJwZrHAA-AGL3s7ZIhd2CKG5sSxoOfxMJ7GGqqn9660b6C7KX5DvPo3WHRDSSkt8_F3Mxf4rVM5CRfMLW8A5O2_4kI0K5hgSPXL_xJdvJge6fLlhpp7nyYTixnQICltvrc_SZ6EfG9pLWFY7jXpSBHfgCPXRI5djyaxvIUTZSDNS0KxHvG6zustM9s0IKC6XZ9S6WItw_l1yjSFvTPia5b7l8FSxKAUWzWt)
