[Take this 1-question poll.](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=87bd7ccc55084b209c7523ac2d5fdccd&_e=hgIWxdp0MOnReN_tlOpP_w-FQgklgK6niqQwNRxdKdQs0S1XqsUFJh-GjzwDqPzqHgyz4yYet_CKOSuYxQnM76H599xxyF9HBkgUTO_JuStNu50wMADpX1Cy8Q0vRn9Gea6P8Z9fCQd-r3cBUoZVGkKcpAzhTmptYqvEYQkYBuO66DJrYdlysBUtQkJC-vvCyy18dwaNXiWtSZOZ5FiRkjZfG-0LJjpYuT3tjd7bs5C6J0MGKi4p5wIUkV-iSxl7qUwK5KglT-eyfaEcAgkyCgyWLuRhBdJwZrHAA-AGL3tuZ_u0uTzDbg1yuJnrBD2X66JmqWew8o3dsTawuMvXZVrnT3Hl7MbvEoPY2v7BumSDDwO7dNkiUSmSkAYp9241E9AKYLNHk61A5VF6rMTX2jxDHqzTF_kcqvjHeEWFgFuUYZW_LZC6sqVfbFhXJ7H71QyDxHqrRxnfArQLNTF-HQ_cSrlV0U4OfM5_lVTSXKAeOuBN9Xe6pqlYJcCS_Qvl)
As a former federal prosecutor, I know firsthand the critical role police play in keeping our communities safe and protecting the most vulnerable among us. They are our first—and often our only—line of defense. **If you want to see what happens when cities defund police, look no further than the skyrocketing violent crime rates in in Los Angeles in 2021 compared to 2020:** Homicides up **23%**. Murders attributable to street gangs up **37%**. Shots fired up **43%**. Aggravated assaults, other violent crimes, and auto thefts all on the rise. The last thing we need is an underfunded police force and policies that make our neighborhoods less safe. We deserve leaders who care about public safety, who support law enforcement, and who stand up for crime victims. **That’s why I’m running for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th district, and I hope to earn your support.** [**Please take this quick poll to share your thoughts on this pressing issue.**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=87bd7ccc55084b209c7523ac2d5fdccd&_e=hgIWxdp0MOnReN_tlOpP_w-FQgklgK6niqQwNRxdKdQs0S1XqsUFJh-GjzwDqPzqHgyz4yYet_CKOSuYxQnM76H599xxyF9HBkgUTO_JuStNu50wMADpX1Cy8Q0vRn9Gea6P8Z9fCQd-r3cBUoZVGkKcpAzhTmptYqvEYQkYBuO66DJrYdlysBUtQkJC-vvCyy18dwaNXiWtSZOZ5FiRkjZfG-0LJjpYuT3tjd7bs5C6J0MGKi4p5wIUkV-iSxl7qUwK5KglT-eyfaEcAgkyCgyWLuRhBdJwZrHAA-AGL3vzSote9frx-t1YT1WMTM9GeenhrfWyjhcQEuCPP-jHbo53UbBNQnjlDqiwaOEZ8U7HrcyygmzrDXG9iOS4mbJSG_B_nIfxs8B6tABd2FPjzmNO5wln8pn5jSJS7yPG6_3oajLwERtNHqWJ0ctX43yjaggwxxGsGYjyGFsOYVhjVy24EqgwNe8kUcZ0xA3oQv2Dc94xeEalTPdVEk-z4ur5) Thank you for your support, Matt Jacobs Candidate for U.S. Congress (CA-26)

clean_body: Cori Bush calls for defunding the police...while hiring private security for herself. Peter, Cori Bush, the liberal activist-turned-Congresswoman, has repeatedly called to “defund the police.” But that hasn’t stopped her from using campaign funds to pay for her own personal security. The hypocrisy is indefensible: “ Security for me, but not for thee.” Do you think it's wrong for a Member of Congress to use campaign funds for personal security, while fighting to defund the police? ✅ ❌ As a former federal prosecutor, I know firsthand the critical role police play in keeping our communities safe and protecting the most vulnerable among us. They are our first—and often our only—line of defense. If you want to see what happens when cities defund police, look no further than the skyrocketing violent crime rates in in Los Angeles in 2021 compared to 2020: Homicides up 23%. Murders attributable to street gangs up 37%. Shots fired up 43%. Aggravated assaults, other violent crimes, and auto thefts all on the rise. The last thing we need is an underfunded police force and policies that make our neighborhoods less safe. We deserve leaders who care about public safety, who support law enforcement, and who stand up for crime victims. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th district, and I hope to earn your support. Thank you for your support, Matt Jacobs Candidate for U.S. Congress (CA-26) | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals or federal government contractors are prohibited. We must use our best efforts to obtain and maintain the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per calendar year. Will you chip in $3 to elect strong House Democrats all across the country? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)**

We need your immediate attention.

**FIRST:**

Stacey Abrams called on us to protect voting rights in the wake of unprecedented Republican attacks:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**BUT THEN:**

Ted Cruz -- one of Trump's TOP loyalists -- just BLOCKED our best chance yet to SAVE voting rights and DEFEND our democracy. **_NO!!_**

**SO NOW:**

**[We're calling on 2,OOO grassroots Democrats to RISE UP before midnight, REBUKE Ted Cruz and his anti-voting rights Republicans, and DEFEND our House Majority:](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

body:
I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b035aa5235a9459097f298ef21167db7&_e=jYYRzpdlRz3oBlx3v-6qWwKCVKJDRBuXO2O7CYoFz0OBMf_vCrbxzL2B_b3I7_9unqGWpXHNk-fUvd54vI11UvUPxDWjst1Auf0AEQLraeTdzS6QmnGamxuT2O6mxaSSnJ_RqNQRb7N0tFD83W9E6jL7VBcuYrIl9p-b8d4jp3su4EDRwbToGOSOxZ-hEBoEL_tQEBe09R12UWbsXMEhHpCVVunuWCfhDXS53EaTtgjSdgRpEO2qMOgTWkh958XojaMpFritesIa33y963KckKJip8ReLF8R9wl0YLcND0mu-MD0hSl-UGSfcNysrKGoWIpbuYlsv12imTYb3TEHMEb4RAxMLBNg_hpsnVJ4Z9k5TmBaYidQc5K0orSDsXpt5-3jIizE8edSj_xSO4PTb9dtC75cY8M35azDd5xEA9fTW29hXpYgZlGLyggezP64EeCqtpIDEMRr9h3O21YUNw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

**[My name is April Becker: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b035aa5235a9459097f298ef21167db7&_e=jYYRzpdlRz3oBlx3v-6qWwKCVKJDRBuXO2O7CYoFz0OBMf_vCrbxzL2B_b3I7_9unqGWpXHNk-fUvd54vI11UvUPxDWjst1Auf0AEQLraeTdzS6QmnGamxuT2O6mxaSSnJ_RqNQRb7N0tFD83W9E6jL7VBcuYrIl9p-b8d4jp3su4EDRwbToGOSOxZ-hEBoEL_tQEBe09R12UWbsXMEhHpCVVunuWCfhDXS53EaTtgjSdgRpEO2qMOgTWkh958Xo8xhBWBNdUYWK5cL4NHcu4gWiCAhO655zaGfAwDyKmGiRZXBv_Dkby4Zq0pEULkLomMwRY0dH4Y5JwdsJpDqV3sSnwYYDzPbjqN3HBSjhx22yS7exDOxu986oEYoH4MEsc-jyXmcdG2RwGfzxzkQJrE-Eppc3kzC8gzY7EvNajMvnEgakOyWy14zzqaQ1Adox9reJZ87bUNE65dlQiBRsJA%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b035aa5235a9459097f298ef21167db7&_e=jYYRzpdlRz3oBlx3v-6qWwKCVKJDRBuXO2O7CYoFz0OBMf_vCrbxzL2B_b3I7_9unqGWpXHNk-fUvd54vI11UvUPxDWjst1Auf0AEQLraeTdzS6QmnGamxuT2O6mxaSSnJ_RqNQRb7N0tFD83W9E6jL7VBcuYrIl9p-b8d4jp3su4EDRwbToGOSOxZ-hEBoEL_tQEBe09R12UWbsXMEhHpCVVunuWCfhDXS53EaTtgjSdgRpEO2qMOgTWkh958XoTAaj03eVq0jY22kl_W9ThG_VBLTVydJt_BwapwLvIZUPYUAd6eLWuPpOFT-kSYe_YhyRcrTqYuFAKGaQwE8LJyjDH5dD2PYBVirQ2VfSIPx7jGWKS627VzUuX_TOIzgwZYioFGYnglRvC5b66bP6pxHRrxdZwqtTDJsCaXxMqhPWbE9NcD7t6xIrJI4EmzaT6JUFoS5A2C85YrkGiUlLSg%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b035aa5235a9459097f298ef21167db7&_e=jYYRzpdlRz3oBlx3v-6qWwKCVKJDRBuXO2O7CYoFz0OBMf_vCrbxzL2B_b3I7_9unqGWpXHNk-fUvd54vI11UvUPxDWjst1Auf0AEQLraeTdzS6QmnGamxuT2O6mxaSSnJ_RqNQRb7N0tFD83W9E6jL7VBcuYrIl9p-b8d4jp3su4EDRwbToGOSOxZ-hEBoEL_tQEBe09R12UWbsXMEhHpCVVunuWCfhDXS53EaTtgjSdgRpEO2qMOgTWkh958Xo5_OxK95M1W7Y50LPqB8kU3TZSH2XHBkcmpzI6hSJbCmSrLk4zbpMkf1qb2V5gVnpRixCzw3W19Ikgtv4VRojB4LE6O8u5Zs0gaEoC2RKmMunP-MCDC4tDrT0qvSAEAUWK575JewsJEdjNbkc6NBSmSP4tvm7FT-1JQf_RwvyHf2lua2QSktrmuh2MlvQc_2LYjfzyW2Tyqfy3sI0gUUULQ%3D%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Fellow Conservative, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b035aa5235a9459097f298ef21167db7&_e=jYYRzpdlRz3oBlx3v-6qWwKCVKJDRBuXO2O7CYoFz0OBMf_vCrbxzL2B_b3I7_9unqGWpXHNk-fUvd54vI11UvUPxDWjst1Auf0AEQLraeTdzS6QmnGamxuT2O6mxaSSnJ_RqNQRb7N0tFD83W9E6jL7VBcuYrIl9p-b8d4jp3su4EDRwbToGOSOxZ-hEBoEL_tQEBe09R12UWbsXMEhHpCVVunuWCfhDXS53EaTtgjSdgRpEO2qMOgTWkh958Xow7zs7eXbLdYz9JQZsMysaP_jXDv88a10TIcjsu9MvgGxOHkrstfYtVo52VIbX-idQra-WMcGdwMjIAKkcsk5IToRpEj14L1En_3ztIkXWtjcOszp4b-r03a5MeEVgG76NpfvA9ns0uW-giDKevj50SL_Ho0VR3G3KN0P27F5y37-ekaQ9haRPQ6D7Iv1TRP9aIxbeMCf1mwAH_10kdF9hA%3D%3D)**

**[I know you don’t know me but take a moment to look up my district. Do some research, and if you’re inclined afterward, please consider a donation of $10 to help me flip this seat RED.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b035aa5235a9459097f298ef21167db7&_e=jYYRzpdlRz3oBlx3v-6qWwKCVKJDRBuXO2O7CYoFz0OBMf_vCrbxzL2B_b3I7_9unqGWpXHNk-fUvd54vI11UvUPxDWjst1Auf0AEQLraeTdzS6QmnGamxuT2O6mxaSSnJ_RqNQRb7N0tFD83W9E6jL7VBcuYrIl9p-b8d4jp3su4EDRwbToGOSOxZ-hEBoEL_tQEBe09R12UWbsXMEhHpCVVunuWCfhDXS53EaTtgjSdgRpEO2qMOgTWkh958XoiVl5fP8E7Xj8PuJT856F5lqzrq3QWPccJF1mZhUoWlNC6Ny9CO9VcFwEFHj53KJRTbWfOxpHffK0xL8aBkVcOw8f0oxR-WG2uSS-2MfAXi4YXTpwJYktXDmXygM9dVQQ2hPAEZ1XHW6mX_04wjICJ6v3JqBneaLnv8PNAI-nBdOkvgkfQfC0jHLInkJHPECxL5E-y2CJB_DNOwWoO4cfZg%3D%3D)**

Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election.

Thank you,

clean_body: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | Fellow Conservative, Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases. I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late. Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. And if you’re a proud Republican man, | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, April is the key to flipping a target district in the swing state of Nevada, ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid For By Becker for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

After personally visiting the southern border and seeing first hand how disastrous these policies are, I know what I think of this crisis, but I want to hear from conservatives like you. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ceadf10c98f14ecfb22e9f68d628ec02&_e=l9avZsgEoQyseCm42dbskoQbuXUxJxZKh8aqzNgeb60x3IhmajHM1t6MQg5I2Kenub-IpSQxRylbhIX7U7gyI6WKs7jzPoxvdVuiMnJLpXbvwN7kqTZcMejxpfy2E8tXpSfch0I1N0TDdOXImCuV0Lf7UPp0Y7YqjqEw0EY_zcof1Po6FMXcJeWJzr8DtwKy995AM0NxLWBwmdUx95eYvuGuujJVJPPuDetPX7xtnZuwvpomFxd17D_m4lPxrlLKPY7MxHokyPnZV0N7UhKbUWIIuOGfQJBZL6z94Epb15ujX_BaPldV7TxwhoeG-e0y7KYzIJOsLMMj5WgoGSDn_kJCDuiucr4blFsvI6YAkm54Y3SK920iN4ad-QuWrLj3sy7AW6Kwj8JzcHnspG_nNpyA-AdEh-tS6cQBoJX1dSpRp1EcoUrwikvIHfVC4OW5)

A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves.

**If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives.**

#

Every sign shows that, if Democrats have Cheri Beasley at the top of the ticket in 2022, then we can flip North Carolina’s Senate seat.
Already this has been rated as one of the most competitive races with the potential to flip blue by both CNN and Cook Political Report.
CNN’s analysis specifically noted that having a candidate like Cheri in a diverse state like in NC is a key reason it is a top seat to flip.
Having won statewide twice, she knows what it is going to take to win this Senate race. In fact, in 2020, more people voted for Cheri Beasley than Thom Tillis, who won the Senate race on the same ballot.

name: Team Lasry
subject: It’s brutal out here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
The summer months are usually the hardest time of the year to hit our fundraising goals, and this month is no different. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33960177/300484389/-838859516?refcode=EM_FR_210812FR_N_TL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDUwOGQ2Mi1iYmZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kT8GHefBL_qIuewnW6jB_2atTWvX_paOBLltVMaDw-k=)
---
| Peter,

The summer months are usually the hardest time of the year to hit our fundraising goals, and this month is no different.

At the beginning of the month, we set a goal to raise $20,000 from online grassroots donations, and we’re only 21% of the way to that goal almost halfway through the month. **We’re not joking when we say we’re in a brutal spot.**

**[But here are a couple reasons why we need to hit our goal every month (and you can chip in now to help us get there):](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33960178/300484390/-838859516?refcode=EM_FR_210812FR_N_TL_90DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDUwOGQ2Mi1iYmZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kT8GHefBL_qIuewnW6jB_2atTWvX_paOBLltVMaDw-k=)**
1. **Hitting our August goal is critical to keep our momentum going strong and fight against Ron Johnson’s corporate special interest warchest.** We need to be prepared for anything the GOP throws at us this cycle -- and rest assured, they will throw everything.
2. **Our campaign needs to move full steam ahead right now -- not later or next year -- right now.** We use your contributions to invest in things like critical campaign infrastructure and digital ads.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Ron Johnson is already attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Ron Johnson is already attacking me, Peter.

Look, I’ve got some pretty thick skin. But it’s the substance of his attack that is far more concerning than anything he’s saying about me. The guy is running around “spreading misinformation and imagining conspiracies” because -- get this -- I believe ultra-millionaires (like him) should pay their fair share in taxes.

I mean, just yesterday, a shocking report came out that Ron Johnson pushed for a provision in the Trump tax bill that directly benefited a few of his wealthiest campaign donors. Yes, you read that right -- a handful of ultra-rich individuals who supported his campaign got tens of millions of dollars in tax breaks. It’s outrageous.

The truth is, I’ve been pretty outspoken on tax fairness because, time and again, we have seen what happens when politicians like Ron Johnson write the rules to put themselves and their billionaire buddies above working folks. As senator, I'll fight for a wholesale rewrite of the tax system that makes the wealthy pay their fair share.

**Ron Johnson is coming after me because “he’s scared.”** He knows I can defeat him, which means I’ll be one of his favorite targets in the race. That’s alright, I can take it. But it won’t stop me from holding him accountable for ignoring the needs of Wisconsin workers and families.

Peter, I need your help to make sure Ron Johnson’s attacks don’t go unanswered. With the attacks already beginning, we can’t afford to fall short on our fundraising. Wisconsinites deserve to know the facts, and I’m asking for your help to reach them with the truth.

[**Make a contribution of $5 or more now to help me fight back against Ron Johnson’s attacks and show you’re standing by me as I hold this corrupt senator accountable to the people of Wisconsin.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33961169/300486824/-1170382953?gpsid=50_130_16924&refcode=em21_210812_MM1_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210812_MM1_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTc1ZDkwMy1iZmZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jCS7rfd-e3kmfpvpoJf7q_Xtqf3L_yiiGcB72cdJOQw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33961170/300486825/-1170382953?gpsid=50_130_16924&refcode=em21_210812_MM1_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210812_MM1_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTc1ZDkwMy1iZmZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jCS7rfd-e3kmfpvpoJf7q_Xtqf3L_yiiGcB72cdJOQw=)

Your generous contributions allow me to spend more time on the road meeting people where they are and talking about the issues that matter most to them. That will be critical to shaping our campaign agenda and our path forward.

I can’t thank you enough for keeping me out on the road. Onward!

— Sarah

subject: They turned their backs on you passing this “Infrastructure Bill”, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HAGERTY
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122415:6CYYm4lsN:m:1:3253819041:60AB854AB0B08800B1A6F697F54E8B10:r)

| Peter,

---
On Thursday night, the **Democrats tried to ram their wasteful, corrupt "infrastructure" bill** through the Senate...

...and **EVERY SINGLE SENATOR but me** was ready to **let them pass it without a fight.** (I couldn't believe what I was seeing, Peter)

So I stood up and fought it. _**By myself.**_

I've only been in the Senate a few months, but never in my wildest nightmares did I expect **_every single Senate Republican but me_ to _betray_ conservative values** like that.

It's clear: we have **TWO fights** to win in 2022:
1. Stop the bleeding... by **defeating the Democrats** and taking back the Senate.

2. Start rebuilding America... by electing a **tidal wave of principled conservatives** who aren't afraid to fight for this nation.

**I won last night 's fight by myself, Peter.** **[But I can't do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122415:6CYYm4lsN:m:1:3253819041:60AB854AB0B08800B1A6F697F54E8B10:r "But I can’t

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: #1 (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here's the bottom line: There’s already overwhelming consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210812-2269-header&t=1&akid=2269%2E434096%2EsZhXJk)
Peter,
It happened again.
CNN dropped a huge article yesterday about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. And guess which state was once again ranked #1:
**Pennsylvania. 😮**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27753?refcode=em20210812-2269&t=2&akid=2269%2E434096%2EsZhXJk)
Believe it or not, Peter, this isn't the first time we've been ranked first in this list (it's actually like the third time — we're losing count at this point.)
**Here's the bottom line: There’s _already that much consensus_ that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022.**
That's why it's absolutely mission-critical that we raise as much money as possible early on to show that John Fetterman is the candidate that can win not just this ultra-competitive primary — but also a tough and expensive general election against the PA GOP.
[**_If you're in a place to do so, will you make your very first $5 donation right now to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate? All eyes are on this race since it's been ranked time and again as the #1 most likely to flip in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27753?refcode=em20210812-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2269%2E434096%2EsZhXJk)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27753?refcode=em20210812-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2269%2E434096%2EsZhXJk)**
This is really big news for our strong, honest, and inclusive campaign to lift up all of PA's 67 counties. Let's seize this momentum and win this thing, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Winning the #1 most likely to flip seat in America is going to take a LOT of support. [** _Click here to donate directly to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate. Any amount you give today will have an immediate impact on the campaign work we can fund _this month.__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27753?refcode=em20210812-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2269%2E434096%2EsZhXJk)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210812-2269-footer&t=24&refcode2=2269_434096_sZhXJk&akid=2269%2E434096%2EsZhXJk)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Here's the bottom line: There’s already overwhelming consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022. Peter, It happened again. CNN dropped a huge article yesterday about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. And guess which state was once again ranked #1: Pennsylvania. 😮 Believe it or not, Peter, this isn't the first time we've been ranked first in this list (it's actually like the third time — we're losing count at this point.) Here's the bottom line: There’s already that much consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022. That's why it's absolutely mission-critical that we raise as much money as possible early on to show that John Fetterman is the candidate that can win not just this ultra-competitive primary — but also a tough and expensive general election against the PA GOP. This is really big news for our strong, honest, and inclusive campaign to lift up all of PA's 67 counties. Let's seize this momentum and win this thing, Peter. Thanks for everything, Team Fetterman P.S. Winning the #1 most likely to flip seat in America is going to take a LOT of support. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8739ee374166/weve-asked-before-but-were-asking-again?e=76fc145c69)

---
| | Folks-

Before we were asking to help out on defending our progressive Delegates, now we're asking for help on electing new delegates. We know that it will take more than a few progressive legislators to make the changes that we want to see. That's why we are pumped to be supporting one of those fresh voices to be a newly elected Delegate this year: Nadarius Clark.
[N](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=2d675d2761&e=76fc145c69)[ADARIUS'S UPSET VICTORY](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cbf8cead55&e=76fc145c69)[ SHOWS HOPE FOR PROGRESSIVES](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=762971bbea&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=31ac43381a&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Joint Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=28e746285f&e=76fc145c69)
To say that we were excited when Nadarius won his underdog primary back in June would be an understatement. The 26-year old activist from Hampton Roads primaried a long term incumbent **and won.** Nadarius ran on all of the issues necessary for the progressive movement here in Virginia like campaign finance reform, climate justice, racial justice, health care, and worker's rights, showing that it is possible to champion these issues and win elections.

Seeing candidates who actually represent their constituencies is all a part of what we want to do here. Nadarius saw that his representative was not working on behalf of the people and he stepped up. Now we're asking you to step up to support him. [Can you help us out by contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=7ea7a60b01&e=76fc145c69)[ to make sure that Josh gets re-elected? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=54ccaac141&e=76fc145c69)
---
| In Solidarity,
Matt

body:
I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88SAbfjRhWUMG8mkueFUp8yay13Chsm2iKuqqcNoUsOsmqzlfgbEZAbYi90evxAG0cxmX8y4930Tg9mUucrkfU_V1dt4IxKmt1Om3EU0bDmv47TQVNNVwLXDX0gVJ-OI-BPV16DlyyiGTNu6texxNZYaL8X6Lsaie4W4pIeRx6tbyhyxCj72wqBQ9uhXF4rgk5gE56KT52lqO1H0hBR4hV0A%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

**[My name is April Becker: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88zxSMKSqJrk9ZEOxu_KblRQ-G5ON08FbOlAznWFxLISxrKeEpk40M-_WgSXi70sSvnT110MWJPILB-sz4IpMRTJbBPpS4DJDzb_VeqVrYRMw57ZA-Zi74nTe8Ho2NoQ_3NpcZYaim0aoF0FwfiQ_JaJDTnM-pugtZ9Zii4AJZjHIVGmd3uvf9sbk1iKSdnVZm0gSyfmWFwI7o1qV0mlo_LA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd884yoTei9AB0HhhVP7nu_uz8ZJrb2dRTzjlmlnZa0JXM-cpfEHAIfPTkGxMbUZG7FR5wJeG6Es2DOIL9bD766csD8kG-iLJWBNE29FqFGcl8lFi_S_4c8t5dXq4j5sF9g_CDnBQ_BPDkSoKro2rawoXLSXA205jGjuAii5B8DOsoKDkyAmI2Pm6IrsJvhxDKUsyHSUFqriOQE2v6aERhUgsQ%3D%3D)
[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88zqdI2RSGjl6wep2c33pOkrge5E1ZCH1S6I-rtcaATeexABScQ3H7MQlG8mB7dnPXbNMdQ9cYtM7MLbWSKfqXaYuav_cGrzafH03_hZq9UdYIui4i-fZhm2n1CtIcNYBfgd9a2rDWza75-yCJOTeVhWMJC_UWMq6ppalCJc6VLuGHxUbKD3su3x0UImOLDHoLIWvFO3vLJMTaOeaidEOTOg%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88CgtgQmhw3F50sXgJurh6gALHaXQBALcHo1y4oCTQ3XEXYBivP3gv3ERUO1txyX_af-fED8KH_7nBB2vCc5KE6PNMWLZoWEqVzo5aAPtXZDrmlfjkh4DN80_SKc9uAEaJ9hXKAYc3HUJ2C6dxQ3z4IhGwvrSjEC-AARx-weE6w_ydIb96xx320rn_bN0fBp9HJcrcT7x6isRiXG-GM8BULA%3D%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Fellow Conservative, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd886vr40MFLbS-XdxrA1vq1G2HzlgJBqGnqLBeXejJff_Nngp8EPE_fguNrBpXn0MwLygq862cPnf3rz_vAZHsqT6vFTOBJwwpdgDcXlj8FvF5sTqHIoD_E39cODbm8ERi6LpTpnsPGQq2Y01vmzXrU8A_Y_4aCKFISnNfZDq3Z_U_4VxUdUVSRz1654cpnU3C9jtnBKPYPYujsGjhEV9vnEQ%3D%3D)**

**[I know you don’t know me but take a moment to look up my district. Do some research, and if you’re inclined afterward, please consider a donation of $10 to help me flip this seat RED.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88QFKyozN0ao588oHZDmgPeMscSVZ_fyIc2gMkxIIfAM3a-KFD-gmWkJxfylHXYe6WXL5uFr17pyza-0p7Jg4co2vCndoNZZx30nGwJBP8Oid9XzZCGlaCFbiwJ-o8IQTec4DLtnDXuBp301OTBIPEKGAH3HZ5dhTiIiBccGWw-rbocItTLudqo1Zwg0YpHf3yyaoKD26lMgroZ7EGUfDjgw%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88-emeAhr0rlCK5CRA52E7piu1-eiC9uwvyD-CuU5gtN6v_iOpjuMtsd8szSEvMZpDRRmuqax-cqJEvHs8AIrbIUCVnmkK126MjM8RvirggxiB4j6oGwOiK200UUxK8J9fIyfL5KIhDhM_J-Yq6_ISP3znvQMTGmX6I49j5IG67jTNn3rbnhm5UWphvkcGEtqzhE7cjK3ahTEaR_0Dx6KqmA%3D%3D)
Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election.

Thank you,
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1c99ecb507c14b29b5ebf76aa40bfebd&_e=x-Yd-FEekju3pMr598OPLn1p-Je17ULPGsNxxu-uI_K54uFipJvXOId1mNS6ps6kydU98BqL6JrS1U85uK2WnBP-e4l0ZIvWn-jqDEEFgtT7codz-L8du2cBbKkfsjp1TNNrIxOgd6pmB7CHvWsSozNEB07ASeuOq-VgF5spr1eropzNCaThI34G42qwjmCePecNeM5z0jKDxN__HbhLE5YTC2ceU9x2gAXqGsTTzCGypGAC_RJNisVA2CHgGd88Edao2ZBrmgOKlbZFkdpg9ljgfJGhnC_ubA_ESt8i-UDS44sFk2sofnghdQGTn_QaLJSwDr5g1JteEcbm7u8u8hJT9brARBn-f4VmdkhLnOPjSqsB87nKr41DUTu6AokvcvYgqCDuPXBoK07ROhxg_Ad5HtwrmfuJBMlwxSv9ySBs2mrSrL3k7hFkOSXm9Yac6wha98Wf4gsOzdKP9Xsyqw%3D%3D)

April Becker
Republican for Congress (NV-03)

P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. clean_body: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | Fellow Conservative, Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases. I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late. Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. In another move of blatant hypocrisy – the leftist Democrats are rolling out new COVID-19 vaccine mandates ... | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=688ddbfd59a748358e09cf4d5e37d1c1&_e=kBWugYpruezwtfLdTsQ0Hf2OGohO_SU-H0sRaVJGDn0jp_lyXPLTcdClmE4yWvEJ7-g-OSRBcXeHGJeTwtdz7rd_HNxpPhZhrMwQKYfucbHrWKicWIi87b_3BFt6F1nzgfuW3ENeK1Z5PiJ1Eb7rX223aLkPMNXkzxynerXp6GVNbr3hGOwidOpb-H2TelD0JJ1HbZT0qgYdngRH6pOGDvK5FhbeUVnuBKR3DJyej-h2mXh-2JxjO8eSnaxQljErjmsgSkfpoDiQsr-E7LCk3ya-hUsRqfLCwpzrF1g5HKXOiD4QtmiPmP0uE-Uzr9CDruAjif2i_1sSoOJGivro2emv1_kJWgbbQjYbTEOrRNARg0LjDTh5B9fTBeguJT2JWzWd5SiCgbLczvNN-XolJCQoEXhsWFKgl7UY9HlYx1Ji4e67sj3crpJj4NhG6aI8MwkCWtUNcbwPWQBjbxU2018y2WYTXepbqTqUH54NwWvdfvQSVgsHKYrXiy6TWXGx_H_ta2OjN6jD2pMgRh5-24qQKnJXddwyBUVeRVr790_xhQN_yePkS0Faizj_ZcAayrqBKpwKBxzaSWPI19HnYg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

In another move of blatant hypocrisy - the leftist Democrats are rolling out new mandates to require individuals to produce proof of their COVID-19 vaccination to enter restaurants, gyms, entertainment centers, etc.

Yet, Democrats strongly oppose laws that protect our elections by requiring individuals to prove their identity with an ID when they go to vote.

It seems logical. If I have to show New York City Mayor Bill DeBlasio something as personal and private as my health care records, just to have a steak dinner in New York City, the least we should do is require people to prove they are who they say they are before they take on the very important responsibility of voting. [**If you agree, will you add your name to my petition to ensure states are being consistent about their identification requirements?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=688ddbfd59a748358e09cf4d5e37d1c1&_e=kBWugYpruezwtfLdTsQ0Hf2OGohO_SU-H0sRaVJGDn0jp_lyXPLTcdClmE4yWvEJ7-g-OSRBcXeHGJeTwtdz7rd_HNxpPhZhrMwQKYfucbHrWKicWIi87b_3BFt6F1nzgfuW3ENeK1Z5PiJ1Eb7rX223aLkPMNXkzxynerXp6GVNbr3hGOwidOpb-H2TelD0JJ1HbZT0qgYdngRH6pOGDvK5FhbeUVnuBKR3DJyej-h2mXh-2JxjO8eSnaxQljErjmsgSkfpoDiQsr-E7LCk3ya-hUsRqfLCwpzrF1g5HKXOiD4QtmiPmP0uE-Uzr9CDruAjif2i_1sSoOJGivro2emv1_kJWgbbQjYbTEOrRNARg0LjDTh5B9fTBeguJT2JUGR9C4W_6F5kT1o7THRnXNKtTmB5bb49jntUBAH7DRM_XUgx01JttrG59Un493dyHEnLAEdXb1trg6OlfhoANeHnOgAHiXZmdoPPqGH2ojSNo1QcIFFGJRjrV7sgpYyZgR2d0eKO4seth1NV31TkuZBt5sWQuYntQSDG1vbB5XyjGSJYW-qkAeYgargCXo_ZqZib6lMpMA7DDwxbHfJLDQ%3D%3D)

---

If states that take federal money for elections feel the need to make residents verify a piece of information as private as their vaccination status, just to return to normalcy, _then they should have no problem requiring people to prove their identity when they go to vote._

That’s why I’ve introduced legislation requiring states who mandate vaccine passports, also mandate voter ID - to ensure they are being consistent about their identification requirements.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=688ddbfd59a748358e09cf4d5e37d1c1&_e=kBWugYpruezwtfLdTsQ0Hf2OGohO_SU-H0sRaVJGDn0jp_lyXPLTcdClmE4yWvEJ7-g-OSRBcXeHGJeTwtdz7rd_HNxpPhZhrMwQKYfucbHrWKicWIi87b_3BFt6F1nzgfuW3ENeK1Z5PiJ1Eb7rX223aLkPMNXkzxynerXp6GVNbr3hGOwidOpb-H2TelD0JJ1HbZT0qgYdngRH6pOGDvK5FhbeUVnuBKR3DJyej-h2mXh-2JxjO8eSnaxQljErjmsgSkfpoDiQsr-E7LCk3ya-hUsRqfLCwpzrF1g5HKXOiD4QtmiPmP0uE-Uzr9CDruAjif2i_1sSoOJGivro2emv1_kJWgbbQjYbTEOrRNARg0LjDTh5B9fTBeguJT2JbDA_EJWN3F932ZVy8Uke-y1eEBoB8T4cLuQ6kmSjZ13K1mBDY88uq4U-h-7zO_jQ_s-p8F5RwQLqhh4W8lz7avrv3XfoduaDfu3cEUvS1v63YccQbDtVXfh2mY6L_WJDTwYKgsK1ItVLSPFFU2oiYCw4kn7qsL93Mg0KrSS3uFjZ8pKtgHcgb8zFGu3BAn8si1GpgL3R_BqTMlxHd6Y_7Q%3D%3D)
This shouldn’t be controversial at all, Peter, in fact, the only reason Democrats are opposed is because it doesn’t align with their agenda.

It’s up to all of us to preserve our precious freedoms, [**so please take action now and sign my petition**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=688ddbfd59a748358e09cf4d5e37d1c1&_e=kBWugYpruezwtfLdTsQ0Hf2OGohO_SU-H0sRaVJGDn0jp_lyXPLTcdClmE4yWvEJ7-g-OSRBcXeHGJeTwtdz7rd_HNxpPhZhrMwQKYfucbHrWKicWIi87b_3BFt6F1nzgfuW3ENeK1Z5PiJ1Eb7rX223aLkPMNXkzxynerXp6GVNbr3hGOwidOpb-H2TelD0JJ1HbZT0qgYdngRH6pOGDvK5FhbeUVnuBKR3DJyej-h2mXh-2JxjO8eSnaxQljErjmsgSkfpoDiQsr-E7LCk3ya-hUsRqfLCwpzrF1g5HKXOiD4QtmiPmP0uE-Uzr9CDruAjif2i_1sSoOJGivro2emv1_kJWgbbQjYbTEOrRNARg0LjDTh5B9fTBeguJT2JFfSmWSeC9n88TFi_XHdsfgbI_Ilbcxls9JvOHyZvTKLL4QkcRn9aioc-hBDF262JNPfTChW7Uv9HWgrpcTnqraHCcRrOpy3ct1b3Iq6QprP1tIdwaOwmU7EazisG9oQcWZS2OdDWQ6otOIgdZQBlOGY1A4C95w86MBTVvRzOroLY5IhNoIIuzwhrGaAWsh5IkmhL2jWqn_UH9yoseAp-xA%3D%3D) -- thank you,Peter -- [**I hope to hear from you today!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=688ddbfd59a748358e09cf4d5e37d1c1&_e=kBWugYpruezwtfLdTsQ0Hf2OGohO_SU-H0sRaVJGDn0jp_lyXPLTcdClmE4yWvEJ7-g-OSRBcXeHGJeTwtdz7rd_HNxpPhZhrMwQKYfucbHrWKicWIi87b_3BFt6F1nzgfuW3ENeK1Z5PiJ1Eb7rX223aLkPMNXkzxynerXp6GVNbr3hGOwidOpb-H2TelD0JJ1HbZT0qgYdngRH6pOGDvK5FhbeUVnuBKR3DJyej-h2mXh-2JxjO8eSnaxQljErjmsgSkfpoDiQsr-E7LCk3ya-hUsRqfLCwpzrF1g5HKXOiD4QtmiPmP0uE-Uzr9CDruAjif2i_1sSoOJGivro2emv1_kJWgbbQjYbTEOrRNARg0LjDTh5B9fTBeguJT2JkcLLXBr01iDEnVXzDmMrVdScNdEOX6jzZwVUAHd_x9uES5XFdu3RZzrLAj8jFE9y6EAM1FkbjO9AqvgMpE9F5YLpfcLUdF3HHcL8d11gNUD7zvJgbwmCX1A5JMYTH6D4HIVhZIs8HzvQvvcgFD0OZM09bvIP2a9CpnFQFjlF5ppDvR1E-ZDyBtiaTl3eHz3_Lbb-VltYWYHnED1e74heDQ%3D%3D)

Sincerely,

Friend,

Joe Biden's southern border crisis is out of control.

_Recently, border patrol agents arrested over 300 illegal migrants, many of which are also registered sexual offenders._ Biden's DISASTROUS “leadership” has led to criminals pouring over the border. _The Democrats cannot get away with this._

_You're not safe anymore, Friend._

| | Team -- _enough is enough._ In recent years we’ve seen the cost of prescription drugs skyrocket well past the rate of inflation, resulting in **Americans of all ages paying more for prescription drugs _than any other developed nation in the world._** **93% of Americans support allowing Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices** \-- and Susie agrees with them. There are two crucial pieces of legislation we need to pass to address the prescription drug crisis Americans are currently facing: -**H.R.3** is a must-pass bill that gives Medicare the power to negotiate lower prescription drug prices -- which would lower prices for seniors as well as individuals and families across the country. \- Susie’s bill, **the Seniors Securing Access to Vital and Essential (SAVE) Prescription Drugs Act** , would help more low-income seniors and individuals with disabilities be able to afford their prescription drugs. It’s time to take action. [**Add your name below if you support legislation like H.R.3 and the Seniors SAVE Act that would lower out of pocket costs and make sure Americans have access to the medications they depend on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33962147/300490018/1015512501?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmFhMmYzNS1jM2ZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEMF0OrZIoTXT2w30V7CUF7Pgi6rX4ck1HSBFvLcqRg=&emci=1b3ed2c5-2ef9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3baa2f35-c3fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957) | | | [TAKE ACTION: ADD MY NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33962148/300490020/1015512501?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmFhMmYzNS1jM2ZiLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEMF0OrZIoTXT2w30V7CUF7Pgi6rX4ck1HSBFvLcqRg=&emci=1b3ed2c5-2ef9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3baa2f35-c3fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

Despite a global pandemic, Big Pharma has continued to hike up prescription drug prices -- _**t**here** have already been 1,100 prescription drug price hikes in 2021 alone.**_
Many families and individuals across the country have had to ration, skip, or sacrifice other needs in order to be able to continue affording their medications.
**Life-saving prescription drugs can only save lives if the people who need them can afford them.**
No one should have to go without their medications. Passing H.R.3 and the Seniors SAVE Act is a top priority for Susie, and she needs to know that she has your support. There are two crucial pieces of legislation we need to pass to address the prescription drug crisis Americans are currently facing: -H.R.3 is a must-pass bill that gives Medicare the power to negotiate lower prescription drug prices -- which would lower prices for seniors as well as individuals and families across the country. \- Susie’s bill, the Seniors Securing Access to Vital and Essential (SAVE) Prescription Drugs Act , would help more low-income seniors and individuals with disabilities be able to afford their prescription drugs. It’s time to take action. | | | Despite a global pandemic, Big Pharma has continued to hike up prescription drug prices -- there have already been 1,100 prescription drug price hikes in 2021 alone. Many families and individuals across the country have had to ration, skip, or sacrifice other needs in order to be able to continue affording their medications. Life-saving prescription drugs can only save lives if the people who need them can afford them. No one should have to go without their medications. Passing H.R.3 and the Seniors SAVE Act is a top priority for Susie, and she needs to know that she has your support. | | Thanks for standing with Susie, Team Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

Peter,

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom will be mailed to **every registered voter** by August 16th - _just days away._

_**But some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122449:6NYMy4lNX:m:1:3253819041:B367877D84176C2712D82799E3B3C2C0:r)
Even though election day isn't officially until September 14th, once voters have their mail ballots **they will cast their votes.**

We need your help to get the word out and help voters understand that before they can elect a new governor of California, **they must first VOTE YES TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM.**

☑ YES**

Even **Sean Hannity** agrees, Gavin Newsom must be recalled - _" By the way, I support the recall . . . Let me be very clear."_

[**Voting in the recall is officially underway now - please chip in $25, $50, $100 or even more to fund the Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee's voter outreach and make sure Californians recall Newsom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122449:6NYMy4lNX:m:1:3253819041:B367877D84176C2712D82799E3B3C2C0:r)

## Read an excerpt from _Radical Nation_ ...
Thank you to everyone who already pre-ordered Radical Nation, it hit number 1 in a several categories because of your support. “The Biden-Harris regime is pushing discredited policies that will destroy the very fabric of America. _**RADICAL NATION**_ provides us with background on the direction they could take us, and ways we can fight back and win.” **—** **Dan Bongino** Breitbart has the first exclusive excerpt from _[Radical Nation](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=15a14159ca&e=f6564bbe3b)_ on the immigration and the media. Read it [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1880eb50ae&e=f6564bbe3b).Check it out and get your pre-orders in now and if you want to host an event on the book tour send an email to contact@seanspicer.com. |

## The battles over masks and vaccines continues...
Do masks work? or only N-95? Battles continue over kids returning to school.A Loudon County teacher quit in front school board because of the left wing agenda they were forcing her to adopt - she urges parents to flood private schools, watch it [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c16f790695&e=f6564bbe3b). And last night on _Spicer & Co _we had Dr. Cody Meissner explain another intricacy of the mask debate on children, watch:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=192ff2591d&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
George P. Bush joined us on Spicer & Co to discuss his race for Attorney General and the latest on immigration in Texas. Watch:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f1b4f40b5d&e=f6564bbe3b)

## Stories I’m reading...
[Drawdown of US embassy in Kabul is under discussion, sources say, as Taliban makes rapid gains in Afghanistan](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5001ae9ca7&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via CNN Im sure its a lot of trouble for CNN to ask the White House about this, but the President said that this wouldn’t happen just a few weeks ago.
|
---
[Baby believed to be world's smallest surviving infant at birth finally gets to go home](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=22edb8c0c1&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via USA TodayThis is amazing.
|
---
[NASA watchdog says return of astronauts to moon by 2024 'not feasible' due to spacesuit delays](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0308e37042&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via CNN Returning American astronauts to the moon by 2024 isn't feasible because of significant delays in developing spacesuits....even though NASA will have spent more than a billion $ on the next-generation spacesuits, until April 2025 at the earliest.
|
---
[Video shows a naked Hunter Biden claiming Russians stole his laptop](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=20a7233217&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via DailyMail

Hunter tells a prostitute that Russian drug dealers stole ANOTHER laptop. Crazy.

So this week I want to know:

RADICAL NATION provides us with background on the direction they could take us, and ways we can fight back and win.” — Dan Bongino Breitbart has the first exclusive excerpt from on the immigration and the media. Read it it out and get your pre-orders in now and if you want to host an event on the book tour send an email to contact@seanspicer.com. | | | | | | The battles over masks and vaccines continues... Do masks work? or only N-95? Battles continue over kids returning to school.A Loudon County teacher quit in front school board because of the left wing agenda they were forcing her to adopt - she urges parents to flood private schools, watch it . And last night on Spicer & Co we had Dr. Cody Meissner explain another intricacy of the mask debate on children, watch: | | | | George P. Bush joined us on Spicer & Co to discuss his race for Attorney General and the latest on immigration in Texas. Watch: | | | | Stories I’m reading... \- via CNN Im sure its a lot of trouble for CNN to ask the White House about this, but the President said that this wouldn’t happen just a few weeks ago. | \- via USA TodayThis is amazing. | \- via CNN Returning American astronauts to the moon by 2024 isn't feasible because of significant delays in developing spacesuits....even though NASA will have spent more than a billion $ on the next-generation spacesuits, until April 2025 at the earliest. | \- via DailyMail Hunter tells a prostitute that Russian drug dealers stole ANOTHER laptop. Crazy. | | | | Last week I asked about Governor Cuomo leaving office- and it came close. So this week I want to know: | | | | | | | | | | | What I’m reading this week... Tucker Carlson has been in DC and journalism as long as I have and has some great stories to share. body:
Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved.

| | | Peter,

My grandfather had to leave school as a third grader to pick cotton, and never learned to read or write. Yet, he lived to see his grandson become the first African American to be elected to both the United States House and Senate.

So when those on the left call me "token", "Uncle Tom" or a "white supremacist" it is more than just insults typed on a computer, they are words that hurt my soul.

_**[The radical Left doesn't care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they're attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a "white supremacist base".](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60207eb35a494599b2c52fc2b91ffbda&_e=D2HD9ByfRWj9Jx8tPoYmWMHsmn0rOwEhhLxUrCQUPRQtx6HC86SgbQOBR5SXjjRIDePORug1uMPsm4jpYseIVmHhX7wo5LhqvxHY2tjaWaTezUHFo_dNEdEBWJkgA056n60K-GqIaZp_OKJlCWLU76chjcQF82oQLkvmpVCukG0HVpz7bIWpCXgekF_waDZ6yncCLIYfCdIFY0FoB5hm9tUjD-0MvO03VnDPqVv_iCCEzhFXeBzo4snURaodAqerQyAnoE91nPy01Uq-Ju76JSHulcy8grwWosjynOOTv0tEuQ9jSVbSiVj-4hEay-FbCrJH4FQ1m2MoSjWmLg9rcnNtvCOgIsOP7ijNVH9x0t6q28RwcfMZ4p84OIuIQEI1T6vLk6xiUnEikOmPcpf1nU0o2d5BZ9bsHzNEmndVqUHTKge1CyyavQT4FwD-YvCsHPwIJDyfXvijUS9IXyINkNbjkZKRaiC5v4j34dFSC8AlH-_a8kiTLqhf3k6sTFG0jmDiVzIiFb45vEO5OmNPYgm7mlwSNf15viPkR89EQKDiMP-NaeimOGadly17SFLv "The radical Left doesn’t care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they’re attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a “white supremacist base”.")**_

Peter, these vile words and attacks should anger you. They represent the very worst of our politics. I strive every day to rise above it and work towards finding solutions for ALL Americans.

We cannot allow the Left to get away with their ongoing attacks against anyone who dares to think differently.

My family went from Cotton to Congress in one lifetime. And that's why I believe the next American century can be better than the last.

I know that the insults and attacks I face today are nothing like the injustice and hatred faced by my grandfather.

**But I know we can do better.

Peter, when you read attacks against me for daring to think differently, don't get discouraged. Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. **

clean_body: Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. | | | | Peter, My grandfather had to leave school as a third grader to pick cotton, and never learned to read or write. Yet, he lived to see his grandson become the first African American to be elected to both the United States House and Senate. So when those on the left call me "token", "Uncle Tom" or a "white supremacist" it is more than just insults typed on a computer, they are words that hurt my soul. "The radical Left doesn’t care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they’re attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a “white supremacist base”." Peter, these vile words and attacks should anger you. They represent the very worst of our politics. I strive every day to rise above it and work towards finding solutions for ALL Americans. | | | "Generic Button" We cannot allow the Left to get away with their ongoing attacks against anyone who dares to think differently. My family went from Cotton to Congress in one lifetime. And that's why I believe the next American century can be better than the last. I know that the insults and attacks I face today are nothing like the injustice and hatred faced by my grandfather. But I know we can do better. Peter, when you read attacks against me for daring to think differently, don't get discouraged. Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. | | | "Generic Button" There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream. I pledge to you that I will fight every day to help ALL Americans achieve that dream and I won't back down from that fight even in the face of hurtful insults from the Left. Tim Scott | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Green New Deal (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
The climate crisis is happening right now, and it’s escalating.
#
On Monday, the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change released an alarming report that made it abundantly clear: **The climate crisis is happening right now, and it’s escalating.**
In North Carolina alone we’ve seen deadly flooding in our coastal communities, ruined crops and livelihoods, extreme weather, and scorching heat.
There’s no time left to wait. Without bold, urgent climate action, we’ll see even more devastation in North Carolina and across our planet.
**This is the moral fight of our lifetime.** Policy, not platitudes, is how we address this climate emergency and take on environmental injustice in our communities.

**Republican Larry Householder** , now-former Ohio House Speaker, fully embraced the bribery and coordinated the money laundering scheme -- securing millions of dollars from dark money groups for his fake nonprofit Generation Now.

It’s been difficult securing investments for our district to get fair standing, and corporations using their influence to buy out our lawmakers is not only wrong but extremely unfair to the people they represent in Ohio.

name: Harder HQ
subject: BIG redistricting news - what it means for Josh
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7DvCfVOfzrk8nEB8CT7H0ph6JWNMUUvvmWeLFjarLfw=/avOph4RedxTWBafyWKXLMBNMZqE5wK-gPMwU21h5ujA=?refcode=E10710-20210812-Redistricting-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter - as you may have seen the census numbers were released today and our team is pouring over the numbers as we speak. Here's what we know: 1\. California will be losing a Congressional seat for the first time ever. This means Josh's district will be redrawn from scratch. We will for sure have _thousands_ of new voters we need to talk to for the first time. 2\. Our purple seat could get even _redder._ Josh talks a lot about how our district is in a sea of red, and he's right. It's possible this race gets even tougher. 3\. We won't know anything definitively for months. Final maps won't come out until early next year, so we have to be ready for _anything._ [**As soon as new district lines are announced, we need to move quickly to reach out to new voters who aren 't familiar with Josh. Can you rush $5 or more to help us prepare for the rollout of new district lines in California?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7DvCfVOfzrk8nEB8CT7H0ph6JWNMUUvvmWeLFjarLfw=/avOph4RedxTWBafyWKXLMBNMZqE5wK-gPMwU21h5ujA=?refcode=E10710-20210812-Redistricting-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/7DvCfVOfzrk8nEB8CT7H0ph6JWNMUUvvmWeLFjarLfw=/avOph4RedxTWBafyWKXLMBNMZqE5wK-gPMwU21h5ujA=?express_lane=true&refcode=E10710-20210812-Redistricting-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

We were already facing one of the most competitive re-election challenges of 2022. Now, things just got twice as hard.
Once new district lines are laid out, we will need to deploy an aggressive voter engagement strategy to raise Josh's name-ID among Democratic and moderate voters, hire organizers in new turf, and begin running digital ads to get Josh's message in front of as many new voters as possible. **Because California has never lost a Congressional seat before, we 're entering into uncharted territory -- and we need to have the resources it will take to prepare for the challenges that lie ahead.**

Peter,
It appears that after a year and a half of preaching the lawlessness gospel of Defund The Police, democrats are coming back to reality.

Or, they have seen the crime surge caused by defunding the police and finally realized that the **American people WANT a strong police force to protect their communities**.

Yet some hypocritical liberals like Cori Bush want to protect themselves with private security, but allow life to get more dangerous for you or your family.

**Everyday Americans can’t afford to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars on private security, and we shouldn’t have to. **

We are the only political organization supporting moms paying for childcare while running for office. Our PAC made a significant investment by establishing a Childcare Fund that our candidates can use to pay for their caregiving expenses. [**Be one of the 27 or more supporters needed from your area by chipping in what you can and help us fully fund our Childcare Program for 2022.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33965883/300521495/600483780?refcode=0812&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMjdlNzc2LWQ3ZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RlgYBPyzczY9oy9l5aBNq0XVefWHQfqevGkd1AjeMKk=) Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter **#momsquad** |

clean_body: If we want to elect more women, we need to help them with the issues they struggle with the most while campaigning. Hi Peter, While many campaigns consider non-election years to be “off-years,” our work to achieve real progress for moms never stops. We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign. = Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. We are the only political organization supporting moms paying for childcare while running for office. Our PAC made a significant investment by establishing a Childcare Fund that our candidates can use to pay for their caregiving expenses. = Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Donald J. Trump August 12th, 2021
The people of Wisconsin are lucky to have a strong and great leader like Representative Janel Brandtjen, who issued subpoenas for Brown (Green Bay) and Milwaukee Counties, and all of their election evidence and so-called results. Wisconsin shows many (to put it mildly) signs of cheating in the 2020 election, and people want answers, now. We still don't know why Michael Spitzer-Rubenstein, a New Yorker, had multiple keys to the Election Day counting rooms, and a City of Green Bay employee ID when records show he was never employed by Green Bay. A Milwaukee election employee even acknowledged dropping off just the margin of ballots needed for a Biden win at 3:00AM. The Great American Experiment cannot withstand corruption. We must demand our elected officials follow the law, and WE MUST HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE. All eyes are on Wisconsin as they begin their election audit. Hopefully Republican Speaker Robin Vos has the integrity and strength Wisconsin needs to support Rep. Brandtjen's efforts. Our Country is counting on it!

Donald J. Trump August 12th, 2021
Had our 2020 Presidential Election not been rigged, and if I were now President, the world would find that our withdrawal from Afghanistan would be a conditions-based withdrawal. I personally had discussions with top Taliban leaders whereby they understood what they are doing now would not have been acceptable. It would have been a much different and much more successful withdrawal, and the Taliban understood that better than anyone. What is going on now is not acceptable. It should have been done much better.

Trump August 12th, 2021 The people of Wisconsin are lucky to have a strong and great leader like Representative Janel Brandtjen, who issued subpoenas for Brown (Green Bay) and Milwaukee Counties, and all of their election evidence and so-called results. Wisconsin shows many (to put it mildly) signs of cheating in the 2020 election, and people want answers, now. We still don't know why Michael Spitzer-Rubenstein, a New Yorker, had multiple keys to the Election Day counting rooms, and a City of Green Bay employee ID when records show he was never employed by Green Bay. A Milwaukee election employee even acknowledged dropping off just the margin of ballots needed for a Biden win at 3:00AM. The Great American Experiment cannot withstand corruption. We must demand our elected officials follow the law, and WE MUST HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE. All eyes are on Wisconsin as they begin their election audit. Hopefully Republican Speaker Robin Vos has the integrity and strength Wisconsin needs to support Rep. Brandtjen's efforts. Our Country is counting on it! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 12th, 2021 Derrick Van Orden is running for Congress in Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District. Derrick is a former Navy SEAL Senior Chief who bravely served and defended our Country. He strongly supports our Military, Veterans, Law Enforcement, and he will always fight for Secure Borders, the Second Amendment, and our incredible Farmers. Derrick has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 12th, 2021 No, as usual, they didn't! I personally had discussions with top Taliban leaders whereby they understood what they are doing now would not have been acceptable. It would have been a much different and much more successful withdrawal, and the Taliban understood that better than anyone. What is going on now is not acceptable. It should have been done much better. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 11th, 2021 RNC is meeting in the wonderful city of Nashville, Tennessee this week. name: Senate Republicans
subject: The spending is preposterous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because... |
---
Peter,

Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because, hey, **what’s another $3 trillion more when we’re so far in the hole that we’re probably never going to be able to balance the budget again?**

**The spending is preposterous** , especially when you consider that Senate DEMS hold the narrowest majority in DECADES. Don’t tell that to Chuck Schumer or Bernie Sanders though. They’re preparing to tee up the most radical legislation since the New Deal passed under FDR. Yet, they have nowhere close to the majority DEMS did 70 years ago.

The thing about the Sanders/Schumer SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA is that this **isn’t targeted spending**. They’re throwing JELLO against a wall and seeing what they can get to stick. ANYTHING AND EVERYTHING IS FAIR GAME.

**We cannot express to you enough how dire this situation is that we find ourselves in** , and we need to hear what you think.

**[Do you support this MASSIVE EXPANSION OF GOVERNMENT? If you think this is as big of a mistake as we do, then for the love of this country, please let us know right now](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=44526fce95524b70b1fbe78596e2d022&_e=Cclfkf364VaAAsDFbWyr-2FZq03eGPuU36lQkR2tPpTb11JgnDqbT_uh-qalNjZPqBa3Dpn7AnAEI96-gcoZxt1Bhy7Yfv5nqkvZzKQ2jhZeM9wVyOTI4eeiUTExgL7zzn4ToSfdv79xkrQmwtnJXcgXU6qGW-IQtz9r6YRjzE0_3SWIwHD6qLi_Cvs43BBDRHiRpzjNFvXlnvwb2Z-p2ac-vvdCGxORoh-uNddBjyDdWKjFDzzSnex5ZhCwQjjnL0Qf1-QdX1ootabuI6iN_WZnI_jIoP8LBOSo8tvz-KU6vceBDIijVrzCmxGUfTUvpgee6OoIUlSPwP2Q7YE8FcbwVik40P3kb2e1RJppd-JoG3fnorifxSCTsBBoP6HQVE_jXYa5qKWY32hb3pAgLwKcdghdsm_xb6fon2hXFJO_0OPpyDO7wl9v99c5Px6dG-Oafz-CHvWiJc9CCOdpMQ%3D%3D)**.

name: GERRYMANDERING PETITION (via DCCC)
subject: petition attached for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you add your name to CONDEMN GOP partisan gerrymandering before 11:59 PM tonight?
| | |
---
We're on high alert here at Democratic HQ.

Today, the U.S. Census Bureau officially released the data that will be used to draw new congressional districts all across the country.

And Republicans are salivating at the chance they now have to GERRYMANDER their way back into power.

[**************Quickly -- will you add your name to CONDEMN GOP partisan gerrymandering before 11:59 PM tonight?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAw_kzQ_)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cv7_)
| [CONDEMN GOP GERRYMANDERING >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

**This is a code red emergency.**

Earlier today, the U.S. Census Bureau released the data that states will use to make new congressional maps all across the country.

Since our House Majority is RAZOR-THIN, we know every change to every seat will make a difference in defending our House Majority.

But multiple reports have revealed this new data could allow Republicans to **GERRYMANDER** their way back into power.

We can't allow them to undermine our democracy with power-grabbing schemes like this.

So we're calling on our very best grassroots supporters to rise up and CONDEMN these power grabs!
[**SIGN ON NOW: Will you sign your name to CONDEMN partisan Republican gerrymandering before MIDNIGHT?**](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
[CONDEMN GOP GERRYMANDERING >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---

Thanks,

Democratic HQ

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45451269&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjczODc2MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. Friend,

Governor Cuomo’s administration has spent the past year lying to the people of New York, but we’re finally learning the truth.

Cuomo LIED about the number of seniors who died from COVID in nursing homes, and he LIED about the 11 women that he assaulted. **And now that he has RESIGNED, we MUST INVESTIGATE.**

And that’s where my good friend **NY State Assemblyman Colin Schmitt** comes in.

I see this as a win-win; Colin can help us Take Back the House and also investigate Cuomo for his gross incompetence.

clean_body: We need to get him the resources he needs! | Friend, Governor Cuomo’s administration has spent the past year lying to the people of New York, but we’re finally learning the truth. Cuomo LIED about the number of seniors who died from COVID in nursing homes, and he LIED about the 11 women that he assaulted. And now that he has RESIGNED, we MUST INVESTIGATE. And that’s where my good friend NY State Assemblyman Colin Schmitt comes in. | Investigating Cuomo starts in the State Assembly, and Colin is just the man to lead the charge! I used to work alongside Colin in the New York State Assembly, and he has always been a fighter for New Yorkers! He also is running for Congress in New York’s 18th District so we can Take Back the House from Democrat control. I see this as a win-win; Colin can help us Take Back the House and also investigate Cuomo for his gross incompetence. God bless you and God bless New York, Rep. Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

body:
Democrats are going to gerrymander the hell out of the map, determining members of Congress for the next 10 years Decisions made at the state level are going to have a direct effect on whether Republicans take back the House next year – and what the competitiveness of our Party will be in the next FIVE ELECTION CYCLES. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0651b355c3c64a3ea1b01682dc91401d&_e=K1M4YbxaTkQZu3KsMIfLd9GbTEExtVejKrE4mJp2MDSC1ZKUuAD2x7Mj3FYr6WDnYcotUz4-IApVbRvV-lw6L00mESVZ7a5JrKGxeyna2s5ThyETeJaxh7R3J7MZYjcLAVaXf6IpEkY-26aP6uxGV9grphtPRe6R0YgylknPSc6155USEh9yjMC4NRMknPqbClriLRHkErhh1JvhwjoqpxyIOZTNV4XLR1lgd2uypLxp5nlSCfilKKh_qPsjK1ZBTpJMnSEIZnregjEQ2VTK5fG4K64lBmq6AxvcDs4kNC4xUnG4r2dLgJwx4V7eCLypSchbnsjVproEp8od23DczwZnyP1n7RV8T2zDAxpWi_EFyt-l1MIh0Y8SuqYQSEM5VEsWiOgIBfouC2qLaH2XvF9Jn6Rl-huA6hkSRXdw6zfPrpycctvsHhbr0UcX45prT8FSDxqSuYMdAKi0DOqjqw%3D%3D)

Peter,

You may have heard that the Census Bureau released data from the 2020 census today which states will use to redraw the congressional maps for the NEXT DECADE.

**You ought to keep reading because this is extremely important.** Decisions made at the state level are going to have a direct effect on whether Republicans take back the House next year – and what the competitiveness of our Party will be in the next FIVE ELECTION CYCLES.

Based off results of the 2020 Census, six states – including my home state of Oregon – will be gaining a seat in Congress. What my campaign and I are afraid of is that the Democrat controlled legislature here in Oregon -- which is in charge of drawing the new maps -- will group all Republicans in the state into one single congressional district, **leaving my campaign for Congress dead in the water.**

**Here is where the details get granular and a bit murky:**
* Dems in Oregon have agreed to let Republicans help redraw the congressional map, but with only seven weeks in which to complete the new map, **how transparent are the leading self-serving, Democrat politicians really going to be?**

[**I have invested too much time and sweat equity running to represent the people of Oregon in the Congress for the last two years to let Oregon Democrats gerrymander the hell out of a map that should favor Republicans in two of Oregon’s five congressional districts. For that reason, I’m setting up a legal defense fund which I’m asking you to contribute to today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0651b355c3c64a3ea1b01682dc91401d&_e=K1M4YbxaTkQZu3KsMIfLd9GbTEExtVejKrE4mJp2MDSC1ZKUuAD2x7Mj3FYr6WDnYcotUz4-IApVbRvV-lw6L00mESVZ7a5JrKGxeyna2s5ThyETeJaxh7R3J7MZYjcLAVaXf6IpEkY-26aP6uxGV9grphtPRe6R0YgylknPSc6155USEh9yjMC4NRMknPqbClriLRHkErhh1JvhwjoqpxyIOZTNV4XLR1lgd2uypLxp5nlSCfilKKh_qPsjK1ZBiLYkO5h9FazFnz13NMKRPdHe5agOfzMKTkBdutowDdB8NSSEcjVWsXYSt-rn_-ZoZsIyOzm6tCxWmZD_nMlqdhHRco09rjFcxtF1z-VPBA1NA7Klz5M2mw5xrM0zcgEah1alLX4vWgJqs8cdw6GS_40ObZsWr2Ewwl9BAx-IDj9ChT8lPcNUUa5AuL6UDYCTK5G877j5TpbUR02yYXivZQ%3D%3D)
