Peter Willis | REQUESTED ON 8/12/2021
EXPIRES @ 11:59PM

**Requested Contribution: $6**
[**FIGHT FOR REPUBLICAN VOTING RIGHTS -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0651b355c3c64a3ea1b01682dc91401d&_e=K1M4YbxaTkQZu3KsMIfLd9GbTEExtVejKrE4mJp2MDSC1ZKUuAD2x7Mj3FYr6WDnYcotUz4-IApVbRvV-lw6L00mESVZ7a5JrKGxeyna2s5ThyETeJaxh7R3J7MZYjcLAVaXf6IpEkY-26aP6uxGV9grphtPRe6R0YgylknPSc6155USEh9yjMC4NRMknPqbClriLRHkErhh1JvhwjoqpxyIOZTNV4XLR1lgd2uypLxp5nlSCfilKKh_qPsjK1ZB6ir3uKpXfnIz58PaTBH2C0Zr68gnghuQ9kIxWIPEv0Gm8oXcUT_GkLOzw7xKf6b_JbOJxXmxW88zYNNWDdXUaSj7XB5EVAn-yITzNXRan5qVhF4JgeNd5FR0YHmZFuFQZvw-HuFrdRE4qUcbxAq77VHoC0z5Ycf7Ro5rUmp3794D18T5vEyFwhX5McvKSLj-vsOhSew2oq49cDvbGzVRzA%3D%3D)

_YOU'VE BEEN SELECTED AS A TOP REPUBLICAN SUPPORTER - PLEASE JOIN THE FUND 11:59PM TONIGHT _

If we have to file a lawsuit to ensure Republicans in our state have a fair chance to elect representatives who share their conservative values, we will. And it won’t be cheap. **We’re likely going to need to raise upwards of $50k.** [**But today, I’m asking you to chip in $50, $25 or even just $5 so we can reach our internal goal of raising $2,000 by midnight tonight.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0651b355c3c64a3ea1b01682dc91401d&_e=K1M4YbxaTkQZu3KsMIfLd9GbTEExtVejKrE4mJp2MDSC1ZKUuAD2x7Mj3FYr6WDnYcotUz4-IApVbRvV-lw6L00mESVZ7a5JrKGxeyna2s5ThyETeJaxh7R3J7MZYjcLAVaXf6IpEkY-26aP6uxGV9grphtPRe6R0YgylknPSc6155USEh9yjMC4NRMknPqbClriLRHkErhh1JvhwjoqpxyIOZTNV4XLR1lgd2uypLxp5nlSCfilKKh_qPsjK1ZBJUjCqDB23f2GQPUtC2NXVRTdOiKgzPSvZruSunztR8JMHC_9JwNnArjakUuW47yk8L6CXylYPpvSTDGv1E1oYKyooZSrA9lb1hatQbwiAFqVw8oyjVAqz-VUNZXIq570MvMk8pRdhhz2uiA9aoatYwy38VM9HBjyRlfbymn7ahqzwR7rieGYVRNwM-Sbt5uQqaPUIwlo716cKuuqfZdqkw%3D%3D)

Here in Oregon, state law “prohibits drawing electoral districts ‘for the purpose of favoring any political party.” But we all know that won’t stop Democrats from trying to rig the final outcome in their favor.

**We’ve come too far and fought too hard to be wiped out of contention for a seat in Congress because Democrats are comfortable with cheating.**

I’m asking you to please consider what’s at stake here: **The House Majority.** Republicans only need FIVE SEATS to take back the House majority, so **[it’s not inconceivable that the House majority could be decided here in Oregon. My race.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0651b355c3c64a3ea1b01682dc91401d&_e=K1M4YbxaTkQZu3KsMIfLd9GbTEExtVejKrE4mJp2MDSC1ZKUuAD2x7Mj3FYr6WDnYcotUz4-IApVbRvV-lw6L00mESVZ7a5JrKGxeyna2s5ThyETeJaxh7R3J7MZYjcLAVaXf6IpEkY-26aP6uxGV9grphtPRe6R0YgylknPSc6155USEh9yjMC4NRMknPqbClriLRHkErhh1JvhwjoqpxyIOZTNV4XLR1lgd2uypLxp5nlSCfilKKh_qPsjK1ZBrG21EiKFeQ2XIkz_JJvyXe9_Re0Iy7sdG_OfiU6Dz_S5_Ypa-FjcAs7Qxg16daBlnISJhn2GExrghezdlrLIK6gS03yn0Qe-i5WLR2zXqYC7bO0hHSHWu2FB32cdStoGodF9P18djg1bdBzQgWObvg_8KY8LT6kDz2heAP9IZ6xOviyi0M0sMqsWpqx1PJXQqLCdXDgoFhBo-OcxUdMeeg%3D%3D)**

You ought to keep reading because this is extremely important. Decisions made at the state level are going to have a direct effect on whether Republicans take back the House next year – and what the competitiveness of our Party will be in the next FIVE ELECTION CYCLES. Based off results of the 2020 Census, six states – including my home state of Oregon – will be gaining a seat in Congress. What my campaign and I are afraid of is that the Democrat controlled legislature here in Oregon -- which is in charge of drawing the new maps -- will group all Republicans in the state into one single congressional district, leaving my campaign for Congress dead in the water. Here is where the details get granular and a bit murky: Dems in Oregon have agreed to let Republicans help redraw the congressional map, but with only seven weeks in which to complete the new map, how transparent are the leading self-serving, Democrat politicians really going to be? | ID: #324852 Peter Willis | REQUESTED ON 8/12/2021 EXPIRES @ 11:59PM | Skarlatos Legal Defense Fund Request | Purpose: To pay for legal fees in the event a lawsuit is needed to hold DEMS accountable for voting rights violations Requested Contribution: $6 YOU'VE BEEN SELECTED AS A TOP REPUBLICAN SUPPORTER - PLEASE JOIN THE FUND 11:59PM TONIGHT If we have to file a lawsuit to ensure Republicans in our state have a fair chance to elect representatives who share their conservative values, we will. And it won’t be cheap. We’re likely going to need to raise upwards of $50k. Here in Oregon, state law “prohibits drawing electoral districts ‘for the purpose of favoring any political party.” But we all know that won’t stop Democrats from trying to rig the final outcome in their favor. We’ve come too far and fought too hard to be wiped out of contention for a seat in Congress because Democrats are comfortable with cheating. I’m asking you to please consider what’s at stake here: The House Majority. Republicans only need FIVE SEATS to take back the House majority, so ** Thanks for your consideration. I’m going to need all of the help I can get. Sincerely, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Senate Republicans
subject: When did Bernie Sanders become president?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because... |

Fellow American,

Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because, hey, **what’s another $3 trillion more when we’re so far in the hole that we’re probably never going to be able to balance the budget again?**

**The spending is preposterous** , especially when you consider that Senate DEMS hold the narrowest majority in DECADES. Don’t tell that to Chuck Schumer or Bernie Sanders though. They’re preparing to tee up the most radical legislation since the New Deal passed under FDR. Yet, they have nowhere close to the majority DEMS did 70 years ago.

The thing about the Sanders/Schumer SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA is that this **isn’t targeted spending**. They’re throwing JELLO against a wall and seeing what they can get to stick. ANYTHING AND EVERYTHING IS FAIR GAME.

**We cannot express to you enough how dire this situation is that we find ourselves in** , and we need to hear what you think.
